name: Bill Weld
subject: here’s what we need to get on the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rQEJir1WAnF67AU0TAQYRUQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=1) Team — here’s what’s going on. Last week I asked you to help contribute to our Ballot Access Fund, a fund we’re using to make sure we’re on the ballot in every state. _Since then, you’ve helped us raise just over $6,780! _**Thank you!** But here’s the bad news: there are a lot of states with ballot deadlines in December, and we need to spend** $40,500 to get on every ballot.** [**We’re trying to raise these funds before the end of November to make sure we can reach our goal. So I am asking you again to please dig deep and help us — can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us raise the $40,500 we need to get on the ballot in every state with ballot deadlines in December?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rQEJir1WAnF67AU0TAQYRUQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=2) | | [CHIP IN
BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rQEJir1WAnF67AU0TAQYRUQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=3)
---
Without your help, I’m not sure we’ll be able to do it.
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191126fr_s&n=7), software for leaders.

name: CoryBooker.com
subject: TV and online ads & organizers in the early states & campaign events & ballot access
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, We've emailed you a lot about our big goal of $1.5 million by 11:59 p.m. on November 30th. Here's where the money will go: **Online ads**
Recent polling shows that a high percentage of people are either undecided or not committed to their current first choice. That's why it's critical we introduce more folks to Cory and our campaign, to make sure everyone knows why Cory is the candidate who can -- _**and will**_ \-- defeat Donald Trump. **[Click here to help fund efforts like ads.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **Organizers in the early states**
Our organizers on the ground are working long hours, meeting caucus-goers and voters in the early states to recruit new supporters to our campaign. **[Click here to help fund efforts like our organizers in the early states.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_l2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **Campaign events**
As our momentum grows, our campaign events are getting increasingly crowded. The more people hear about Cory, the more they like him, and these events allow folks to connect with Cory face to face. **[Click here to help fund efforts like expanding the number of campaign events we can host.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_l3_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **Ballot access**
Getting Cory's name on the ballot isn't easy. Every state has different rules and requirements that candidates must fulfill to appear on the ballot, many of which include large numbers of petition signatures from voters in the state. We need to have team members on the ground all across the country to get this done. **[Click here to help fund efforts such as ballot access.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_l4_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As you can see, running a presidential campaign is not cheap. Right now, we need to raise $1.5 million by the end of the month to continue financing all these initiatives. And we're relying on people like you to help us get there. Thanks for chipping in,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_button1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_button2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_button3_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191126_BHQ_20191126-fr-BHQ-breakdown-actives_actives_button4_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0e/1720733809/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0d/1720733809/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0c/1720733809/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0b/1720733809/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0a/1720733809/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd7/5fca0d19/797dc276/291cad0e/1720733809/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: TomSteyer.com
subject: If politics comes up at Thanksgiving...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hi friend, The holidays are a chance to come together for quality time with your family — and sometimes, that quality time comes with a side of political debate. Tom wishes he could sit down with each of us over Thanksgiving dinner to talk about where he stands on all the important issues facing our country. But while he can’t do that, we can still make sure the issues that Tom believes in — the issues we all believe in — get their time when politics inevitably comes up as the pumpkin pie is served. **We’ve put together a quick list of ways to talk about these important issues with your loved ones this holiday season — and why Tom is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and to lead our country.**[_**Take a look!**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BVprR1Oy5Oc8taDz8b9M92-2BX1dDgNInO-2FHkb1MyJ567oVvO2j67Dhm7sEV0APVppJs-2B5D3xzLB-2F9AKZBL6O1jcbOHEmvQzcp9E6UVNDXFIWW7DId68u1wPBxDdM1ZVK7BDBXFNXlVstBDoka3SUppWfCAvXH-2BwQPXmQ-2BvGKrTadZtfapxaOylqB58pULc4nsRk-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFf9SC0OIMhp2MbvY87s7fYiQ23U0GFttfT99jySGC53LA75MoE5CgNTqEIkIgLmsmKElpfm3vJlWSM5fNaP0QNXnBTc3V8GNPuwALvm8XbRXziztPBL-2FXgonOrFjY4aE-2BUjc34Rd-2BCbdiZFkKUDQuTsRZEhx6DhJfi62lNvDXnttfxHAKXgyYYvXCC7HD-2FuNe7vyZwFHj8R58ZoWGz947Qs43owV0gIPHJ8t-2Bqq0sNo99myhxUzd5t2kbv-2BBQxw5wbcZ10MFXzf-2BBzSRoNg4cRdE7dzMtncsIarlPH4koG7zmsDsHyr48cC44vGsqF062GURmfiPZi6GrEwgKVTH7dxrQlmk0tANj63gnjS8HRDsA-3D-3D)

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: The democratic candidates all agree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
During the third democratic debate the issue of voting rights took center stage. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5a5/34a064cc/1b1c8e10/70365aa/3641385118/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - The 5th Democratic debate took place right here in Georgia, a battleground state in the fight for free and fair elections -- and we heard the first questions about voter suppression. **The candidates were clear: across the country, free and fair elections are under attack.** Right now, free and fair elections are under attack across the country. Today in Georgia, more than 300,000 voters are in danger of losing their right to have their ballot cast and counted. I started Fair Fight because I wanted to make sure that every voter who has the right to vote has the ability to leverage that right. As states around the country pass legislation that limits access to voting, Fair Fight's work is more important than ever -- so we're coming to you with an important ask: [**Can you chip in today to help Fair Fight ensure that every voter in every state can participate in our elections? Every vote counts and with your help we will make sure no one gets left behind.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5a5/34a064cc/1b1c8e10/70365ab/3641385118/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI2MTlERDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112619DD5-1-b") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5a5/34a064cc/1b1c8e10/70365ab/3641385118/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI2MTlERDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112619DD5-1-b")** As you know, the fight for free elections is personal for me. I have spent my life dedicated to fighting for the right to vote. When I ended my campaign for governor, I dedicated myself to protecting that right in Georgia and across the country and building a national effort to fight back against voter suppression. Together we can ensure that every voter has a Fair Fight. Yours in the fight, \- Stacey Abrams **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5a5/34a064cc/1b1c8e10/70365ab/3641385118/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMTI2MTlERDUtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE112619DD5-1-b")**
---

body:
I've been a bit busy doing my job in the Senate while also running for re-election, so here's where I could really use your help.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191126-busy?refcode=em191126-busy&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team,

I'm doing everything I can in the Senate to stick up for folks like you and fight for the progressive values we all share -- like making sure everyone has the health care they need and creating a government that works for all people, not just the wealthy and corporations.

**Since I'm busy doing all of that, here's where I could really use your help.**

We're behind on our grassroots fundraising target for the month. November has been pretty terrible for this kind of thing. Folks are slowly tuning out as the holidays inch closer, which means our fundraising has slowed down -- not by a lot, but enough to make a difference.

A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline this week should do the trick. So, I'm asking:

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Ad decision tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Help us finish the year strong

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3783%2E377263%2EqhUZ4C) Yang Gang --

Ad buys are a crucial part of a presidential campaign. They spread ideas to new voters and keep our message alive among supporters in the early states.

But, we need to raise $135,865 by midnight in order to keep them up. Ads make a huge impact -- but they cost a lot to make it happen.

**[We need you now more than ever, Yang Gang. Contribute $10 or more to keep Andrew’s message alive.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18025?t=5&akid=3783%2E377263%2EqhUZ4C)** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18025?t=8&akid=3783%2E377263%2EqhUZ4C)
---
If we have to pull back our spending in key states, we will be going into 2020 playing catch up -- and with so much at stake, we can’t let that happen.

Instead, help us finish the year strong and make sure Andrew goes into the new year on top.

**[Contribute $10 or more RIGHT NOW to make sure Andrew enters 2020 ready to fight for and win early voting states.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18025?t=7&akid=3783%2E377263%2EqhUZ4C)**

Strong ads make for strong campaigns. And that’s why it’s so important we keep Andrew’s commercials on air in Iowa and New Hampshire.

Thanks,

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18025?t=6&akid=3783%2E377263%2EqhUZ4C)

name: Peter Khalil
subject: Let's take a beat...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil
body:
| | | | ...before 2020 comes...
---
---
**—**
There’s a tone to the holidays: Warm, relaxed, comfortable, nostalgic, and full of light.
Every holiday season, my school’s headmaster, John Hanly – a warm-eyed, white-haired Irish wit who made a point to commit to memory the names and faces of every student at my school even before their first day – would read us the 1952 Dylan Thomas story, "A Child’s Christmas in Wales."
For my classmates and me, this reading was a relaxed beat before the frenzied end-of-year sprint through exams to Winter Break. It set just the right tone. A few years ago, our school’s alumni association informed us that Mr. Hanly was bedridden due to complications from Parkinson’s Disease. The school invited alumni to contribute to a collective reading of "A Child’s Christmas in Wales" in honor of Mr. Hanly.
At the time, I was too timid, for whatever reason, to make my own contribution to the reading. Perhaps it was the strong emotion of the prospect of losing an educator and mentor – the man who taught me my first class in ethics. I have always regretted that.
So, in honor of Mr. Hanly and to set the tone for these holidays before the frenzy of 2020, [I now read to you, in four parts over four weeks, without political or religious motive, "A Child’s Christmas in Wales," by Dylan Thomas. I hope you enjoy it](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYNwROaIMb-2B7rrPXqqCPKzbbF7yuvsddEd9Eu2cQCXGbQaNj-2FhFb-2BvJlxM-2F6eE3AROEg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxVQoAKRnilWBDdIQJz6-2FRjLAb9St5qPH8aCJFPnee5O3SesAQyqeIzWslU-2BLKU9V5N5aTRUvDUl-2B5T9Iooij5YLzDvx6hSy4Fh96A-2Fio9OnnRzhPqL73WVHsbu67I0v9Wj5p7cyxk84ucID7KZ0-2FH7RkmJjHRpEZA0rl9yzGfkmREytE4ymynDgB3DOFYfAqqucPlAwt3qq0x1QDrZxvv8jXXmHH8dgf-2B9-2FQ-2BOGojS7JMHMNtCho6MmggY4uqBq5pXmBUg5JuxivaimLUt7-2F2VtDJTb1oHHYY8o8QK-2FH18wl9dI3pNKOgU9OFPQzOMBZMuA-2BTZdrSekO2e3NQL-2FBM-2FXqnMLUAOAVXNa4Xm54SM6weduF21wstpdo0wsi8fkMgjYvUZpB-2FQ5H51RVUPqg1GeMHGsPMxBBBoeeyCWRVCxWi74dWA56nL8xFJ-2FroAv-2B3wjMuVzsA0CQeTIK36oaCig-3D-3D)[. ](https://u10586488.ct.sendgrid.net/wf/click?upn=W9Smq9u-2FGdEKDZ-2FVYToYNwROaIMb-2B7rrPXqqCPKzbbF7yuvsddEd9Eu2cQCXGbQaNj-2FhFb-2BvJlxM-2F6eE3AROEg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCERHvyJx0KbFNmY2J7ZEKFKefcffNXOVKWpqwejHvWn1-2F3qFhsV-2FmaEkQjQPr-2FMffelBPPeLb2a-2BQnbGML-2Be3VxVQoAKRnilWBDdIQJz6-2FRjLAb9St5qPH8aCJFPnee5O3SesAQyqeIzWslU-2BLKU9V5N5aTRUvDUl-2B5T9Iooij5YLzDvx6hSy4Fh96A-2Fio9OnnRzhPqL73WVHsbu67I0v9Wj5p7cyxk84ucID7KZ0-2FH7RkmJjHRpEZA0rl9yzGfkmREytE4ymynDgB3DOFYfAqqucPlAwt3qq0x1QDrZxvv8jXXmHH8dgf-2B9-2FQ-2BOGojS7JMHMNtCho6MmggY4uqBq5pXmBUg5JuxivaimLUt7-2F2VtDJTb1oHHYY8o8QK-2FH18wl9dI3pNKOgU9OFPQzOMBZMiaUwimXG6RNqd6g5dXwZvp0ocICEe8s8wnGF2jDCGA5JPG6njvQu6zpJqfezWz8wJDOE4BwEwD10WnVSIgfTkftTLgMibXLwAgN6ycIfIqDNu3kKDPBg8-2FByTbsDg4s8I8YGtK-2BluXnAnNNZan6fNQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: | | | | ...before 2020 comes... — There’s a tone to the holidays: Warm, relaxed, comfortable, nostalgic, and full of light. Every holiday season, my school’s headmaster, John Hanly – a warm-eyed, white-haired Irish wit who made a point to commit to memory the names and faces of every student at my school even before their first day – would read us the 1952 Dylan Thomas story, "A Child’s Christmas in Wales." For my classmates and me, this reading was a relaxed beat before the frenzied end-of-year sprint through exams to Winter Break. It set just the right tone. A few years ago, our school’s alumni association informed us that Mr. Hanly was bedridden due to complications from Parkinson’s Disease. The school invited alumni to contribute to a collective reading of "A Child’s Christmas in Wales" in honor of Mr. Hanly. At the time, I was too timid, for whatever reason, to make my own contribution to the reading. Perhaps it was the strong emotion of the prospect of losing an educator and mentor – the man who taught me my first class in ethics. I have always regretted that. So, in honor of Mr. Hanly and to set the tone for these holidays before the frenzy of 2020, I must end this message as I end all messages: , because it is my job to keep this campaign afloat. The holidays are a notoriously slow time for political contributions. Nobody wants to talk politics while they are trying to reunite with family and kindle the feeling of goodwill that comes with the season. But this is a different kind of campaign: a campaign fueled by goodwill, kindness, and love for one another - love for our friends, our neighbors. As the year ends and you are considering your investments in the future, whether a contribution to charity, to family, or to savings for a rainy day, . With gratitude and warmth, in the spirit of the season, Peter Fuel the Progressive movement in SW Washington and help us get an office by becoming a sustaining donor! | Paid for by the Committee to Elect Peter Khalil

The Fake News media and the Democratic partners aren't backing down from this nasty Witch Hunt battle. They're continuing to spew lies to the American People in the hopes of tarnishing my father's name. When will they realize IT'S NOT WORKING!

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12283129/126173939/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2E1NDY0My0zMzExLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dCzvQfI5DzALpXKXOuN7nwktWlzmUfm9Nc_MP_Xrdk0=&emci=cd72ff04-8c10-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3ca54643-3311-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| | | | Peter,

Thanksgiving is a time for gratitude, and it is with a very grateful heart that I send my very best wishes to you and your family for a Happy Thanksgiving.

President Abraham Lincoln first declared Thanksgiving a federal holiday in 1863 in the midst of the Civil War. Even in those dark and divided days for our nation, Lincoln understood the importance of coming together to give thanks for everything good that we have been given. At this time, it is especially fitting that we remember Lincoln’s call to be grateful and give thanks.

The support that you have provided in our fight to improve the everyday lives of working families and retirees has been tremendous, and I want to take this opportunity to express my thanks. I am forever grateful for all of the support I have received from volunteers and well-wishers who have joined our fight for commonsense solutions.

There is much work ahead of us in the coming months, but for now, let’s take some time to relax with our families and loved ones and reflect on all that we are thankful for.

I wish you and your family the very best in the coming year and thank you once again for your support.

Happy Thanksgiving!

Dan

| |
---
_Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. name: Team Stephanie
subject: Can you make your first donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Thanks for being a supporter of our campaign. Can you make your first donation right now before our end of month fundraising deadline?
|
---

| | Friends -- We started this campaign with a modest, but hard-working team--just Stephanie and one staff member. In our first month, we nearly outraised our opponent, a 39-year incumbent. Three months later, we have four staffers and we're building the plans we need to flip this district in 2020. To keep growing, we need to hire a few more people and open a campaign office. **It 'll take $2,100 to open up our first campaign office--that includes our rent, wifi, desks, chairs, and a lot of coffee.** **[Can you chip in $39 today? Your donation will help us open our first campaign office.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08a/522d4087/7afce09b/4f341bf5/2320848243/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191127_em&amount=39")** | **[CHIP IN NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08a/522d4087/7afce09b/4f341bf5/2320848243/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191127_em&amount=39")**
---
From day one, we've run a grassroots campaign. No frills. No big donors footing the bills.
We don't have dark money groups or corporate PACs on our side: We have you, grassroots supporters who want to see real change in New Jersey's 4th district.
We're going to ask you to do a lot over the next year--knock on doors, make phone calls, and yes, donate--because the only way we are going to win is by working together to make real change in this district.
**Now, we need to ask you to step up and make your first contribution.[Can we count on you to chip in $39 to help us open our first campaign office?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08a/522d4087/7afce09b/4f341bf5/2320848243/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191127_em&amount=39")**
-- Team Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08a/522d4087/7afce09b/4f341bf4/2320848243/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

Next year's election is without question the most important election in our nation's history.

**But right now, Democrats risk losing everything -- again -- by offering impossible promises to solve our nation 's challenges.**

_I refuse to let that happen._

That's why I've been one of the loudest voices calling for universal health care while keeping private insurance plans intact so millions of people don't lose the plans they have.

That's why I'm one of the only candidates calling for partnerships between the public and private sector to achieve public good.

I am putting everything on the line so that we don't wake up on November 4th wishing we did this differently.

But I need to know you stand with me. I need you to have my back if we're going to continue to spread our message.

**[Will you give $5 to my campaign today?-> https://go.johndelaney.com/Donate](https://go.johndelaney.?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jkd_fr_q42019?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.27_e1_jkd_eom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Silver Spring&state=&zip=20906&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+give+5+to+my+campaign+today+rar&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.27_e1_jkd_eom_all&source=em_fr_2019.11.27_e1_jkd_eom_all")**

Your grassroots support is critical to this campaign. I'm counting on your support.

Thanks for everything,
John

name: MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: Help us unlock the MATCH!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
After 17 years in Washington, Senator Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest that's heavily funded by corporate PACs.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099d/7f51f7bc/4b90b105/4ef08849/33298588/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **MJ for Texas**

**Amount needed to unlock match:** _$15,000_
**Donor status: Not yet!***
**Deadline:** _Midnight_ **[**MAKE A DONATION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099d/7f51f7bc/4b90b105/4ef0884f/33298588/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.1nd__561__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
Peter --

With just days left to go before our November deadline, we want to offer a **match opportunity to all of MJ's supporters!** But first we have to **unlock the match.**

We're asking you to chip in by midnight tonight so that we can **match ALL donations** made to this campaign before the end of November. **We just have to raise $15,000 by midnight![Can you chip in to unlock this incredible MATCH opportunity?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099d/7f51f7bc/4b90b105/4ef0884f/33298588/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.1nd__561__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

After 17 years in Washington, **Senator Cornyn has a nearly _$11 million_ war chest** that's heavily funded by corporate PACs. Texans are hungry for change, but MJ will need your help to defeat Senator Cornyn and his big-money backers next November.

Unlocking this match is a critical opportunity for our campaign -- and with our end-of-month deadline looming, we can't let it go to waste.

**Every dollar we raise before midnight brings us that much closer to unlocking this match, defeating Senator Cornyn, and sending MJ to the U.S. Senate. Will you pitch in to help us raise $15,000 today?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099d/7f51f7bc/4b90b105/4ef08842/33298588/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191127.1nd__561__&amount=25")**

name: Jenny (Finance Director)
subject: Working a half day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I'm getting ready to pack things up in the office before the Thanksgiving festivities start. But there's something that I just know is going to be in the back of Mark Warner's mind heading into the ho
|
---
| | Hey Derek,

I'm getting ready to pack things up in the office before the Thanksgiving festivities start. But there's something that I just know is going to be in the back of Mark Warner's mind heading into the holiday.

**We're still about $12,651.77 short of our November fundraising goal, and this is as deep a hole as we've been in so far in this campaign.** | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3f/3024188733/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Maybe people are tired after the Virginia elections earlier this month... I get that. But now that Mark Warner's race is in full swing, and with so much on the line in 2020, we just cannot afford to start falling behind.

I'm not going to bug you on Thanksgiving or anything like that. But before I head home, I want to make one last request of you, Derek. **Will you chip in to help Mark Warner's re-election campaign hit our November goal?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3e/3024188733/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3d/3024188733/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3c/3024188733/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3b/3024188733/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec3a/3024188733/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?express_lane=true&refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec39/3024188733/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
I hope you have a great holiday and time with friends and family. I know Mark is so thankful for your support, and I appreciate you being there for this campaign every step of the way.

Thanks,
Jenny

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d763/53d9897e/53f957ab/1c89ec38/3024188733/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM2NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-noveom?refcode=20191127nd__366__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****

name: Nikki Foster
subject: I'm thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf1c/30a4f917/509045fa/28ced3e6/1647185852/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1")

| | My parents immigrated to this country to build a better life and with hard work, and a little luck, they provided a great life for our family. My parents taught me the value of hard work. As a pilot in the US Air Force, as an All-American rugby player, as a mother of two -- I've never been afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I'm so thankful to be where I am, my husband and I are lucky enough to have two healthy children -- especially after our time in the ICU with my son Henry, after he was born with a hole in his heart. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - My parents immigrated to this country to build a better life and with hard work, and a little luck, they provided a great life for our family. My parents taught me the value of hard work. As a pilot in the US Air Force, as an All-American rugby player, as a mother of two -- **I 've never been afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work.** I'm so thankful to be where I am, my husband and I are lucky enough to have two healthy children -- especially after our time in the ICU with my son Henry, after he was born with a hole in his heart. **But we know that we 've been lucky -- and this isn't the case for every family -- so many in this country are struggling.** Bankrupted by medical debt, stuck in a job not paying a living wage, injured while serving our country -- my family and I easily could have found ourselves in far more dire circumstances. So while we give thanks tomorrow, **I hope we also continue to advocate for those who have been harmed by a system that benefits those at the top more often than those at the bottom.** We have to fight for policies that help families struggling to make ends meet -- people who do everything right but still can't get ahead. **My Republican opponent Steve Chabot has failed working families and our seniors** \-- he's voted to gut Medicare and won't protect Social Security, he stands in opposition to a pay raise for working Americans, and chose to give extreme tax cuts to the wealthiest of Americans. We can't afford two more years of this recklessness and callousness. [**So I 'm hoping you'll make a donation to my campaign ahead of our end-of-month deadline so we can start making government work for us again ->**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+So+Irsquom+hoping+yoursquoll+make+a+dona&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM1_U1_X1")

clean_body: | "" | | My parents immigrated to this country to build a better life and with hard work, and a little luck, they provided a great life for our family. My parents taught me the value of hard work. As a pilot in the US Air Force, as an All-American rugby player, as a mother of two -- I've never been afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I'm so thankful to be where I am, my husband and I are lucky enough to have two healthy children -- especially after our time in the ICU with my son Henry, after he was born with a hole in his heart. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - My parents immigrated to this country to build a better life and with hard work, and a little luck, they provided a great life for our family. My parents taught me the value of hard work. As a pilot in the US Air Force, as an All-American rugby player, as a mother of two -- I 've never been afraid to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I'm so thankful to be where I am, my husband and I are lucky enough to have two healthy children -- especially after our time in the ICU with my son Henry, after he was born with a hole in his heart. But we know that we 've been lucky -- and this isn't the case for every family -- so many in this country are struggling. Bankrupted by medical debt, stuck in a job not paying a living wage, injured while serving our country -- my family and I easily could have found ourselves in far more dire circumstances. So while we give thanks tomorrow, I hope we also continue to advocate for those who have been harmed by a system that benefits those at the top more often than those at the bottom. We have to fight for policies that help families struggling to make ends meet -- people who do everything right but still can't get ahead. My Republican opponent Steve Chabot has failed working families and our seniors \-- he's voted to gut Medicare and won't protect Social Security, he stands in opposition to a pay raise for working Americans, and chose to give extreme tax cuts to the wealthiest of Americans. We can't afford two more years of this recklessness and callousness. name: Booker HQ
subject: Exciting news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
We're launching a six-figure ad buy. These ads will make a real difference and reach people who are either undecided or may change their mind about who they support.
| | |
---
| This may only be exciting to me, team (because I really love digital ads), but: **We 're about to launch our first digital persuasion ads of the campaign!** Beginning this week, we're going to start running ads online and on the radio -- and we're working to raise additional money to place our first television ads, too. Here's why ads are great for campaigns like ours. They can:
1. Introduce people to Cory who aren't familiar with him;
2. Give undecided voters and caucus-goers more information about Cory;
3. And make sure those who have Cory in their top few know now's the time to get off the fence!

**Help make sure we have the resources to run ads and get Cory on the December debate stage -- chip in now >>** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_BHQ_20191127-fr-BHQ-adlaunch-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

Cory's message has been consistent since the day we launched this campaign. The only way to beat Donald Trump and move our country forward is by bringing people together -- that's the only thing that's _ever_ made change in this country.
Now, our new persuasion advertising campaign will elevate that message to the voters we need to reach to meet the critical polling threshold -- the only thing that stands between us and the December debate stage.
So that's the punchline: These ads are important! And we can't run them without your support!
**[Will you chip in to help us keep running these ads?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_BHQ_20191127-fr-BHQ-adlaunch-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Most voters are still making up their minds -- let's talk to them right now, this week. You in?
Thanks,
Jenna
Jenna Lowenstein
Deputy Campaign Manager
Cory 2020

It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd1/5fca0d19/7967311b/291cac68/2197105732/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Here's what's happening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Peter,
As we approach the Thanksgiving holiday, I want to give special thanks to you and all of your fellow supporters of our campaign. This has been an incredible campaign so far, and it's all because of you.
We've had another big week here on the campaign trail, going to events around the District, gaining new endorsements, and meeting so many wonderful and supportive people.
---
| Top Social Posts
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS8cfuxXjxi190te0xEsoxGdRL8ZK-a11J9SMf9apOtadMMCUj2rmt-JT-eIUlZeutixPpLN3VdBDx6CHKnL1eL8JXz99HD06AwxzY4k9kDfFM1gmFkwAnLQ=&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS8cfuxXjxi190te0xEsoxGdRL8ZK-a11J9SMf9apOtadMMCUj2rmt-JT-eIUlZeutixPpLN3VdBDx6CHKnL1eL8JXz99HD06AwxzY4k9kDfFM1gmFkwAnLQ=&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==)
---
| I've also released several [detailed policy positions on my website](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS4Aa8OTnCmAlZ1l3HgbmvrG0k-FN7o30yUgx8MLZfro6ejXsIDcQvhBI59geZibuzdiNqqusnFWW7l3gdp7FZc43pPOXirrRPydCXO8crfwE&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==). These aren't just your standard political talking points either. They're real and detailed explanations of where I stand.
After last week's Democrat debate, we also released Part III in our video series highlighting some of the weirdest moments of the debate. If you haven't seen this video, I highly recommend taking a minute to check it out below.
---
| Dem Debate "Highlights" Video
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS4Aa8OTnCmAl8K0a6UIm7mh63yjPeAEiWKttIrPtStp6T3UX0G5ZFxsmHLHaUih5Rp6AKGSgK1EWad2UD-zQjuaqsxy3lC51YA==&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==)
---
| We have officially entered the holiday season, but as you can tell, we're not slowing down. In fact, our campaign is busier than ever. I'd like to wish you and your family a very happy Thanksgiving, and I look forward to seeing you out on the campaign trail.
Thank you so much for your support!
---
|
---
| Genevieve
---
| |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GSzaHVKkVwCQcTsCwRI0Mblq9brojX0fzJBD4-G1_t17qrgU1Fnl47W4Qv5KYHFomM8D6tBKOONh2qGbYDAAkPXk5-Ojxzh0l4CnNfra-msjW&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS3djNmTuRHQ8MXRgyZWTdDBWaZSYwQQMKMSIVGt7FE8ahf11tjez4beCSeFGenDHCRg9UwqwzIqcxbFTJ5uOqraUIjrGVgand5V3Fv3Q-NKh&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jv_4oYGZVr1gozF7HmOg8vf6sTLKCBixE-steMN_cwzr6h5uZo3GS3djNmTuRHQ8b8GcIP794OqTkbbhy21wcei6osni0gfj4nWKWqxd9WXGLXI7lUQBSaxBaX5bdUsY64Ra0S_-C7UbVHL0xw3cAhEy5g-UMNtAFFONKnMS3s4=&c=1CqMLXrOm9-hC9XUKiR5el0SC7dETn6b8igqgSh7aiPgjH4_HKq_pg==&ch=JE-dUlefRP-z4tBd7N_ayjtK7cpPROPje0QLQ5EaVWBKVzH0Y8_LXg==)

We are prohibited by campaign finance law from accepting contributions from lobbyists and political committees during the regular legislative session. If you are a lobbyist or PAC, you received this mailing in error and we apologize for that error. We are required to collect and report the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per year.

Peter,

_In 1998, while campaigning as Governor, Jeanne Shaheen took a “no-new-taxes.” pledge to the people of New Hampshire._

_In 2001, she attempted to force through a sales tax – which would have been the first in state history._

**Thankfully, Shaheen failed – but it exposed the type of double-talking politician she really is.**

**Two decades later, Shaheen’s political career is somehow still ongoing – and that’s where you come in. Shaheen is a U.S. Senator, and after endorsing Hillary Clinton in 2016, we need to raise funds to send Shaheen home for good.**

---
| | Y'all, Former Ted Cruz chief of staff Chip Roy seems to think his job is offering broken, dis-proven "solutions" to real problems:- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - >
Elizabeth is fighting for big, structural change with her ideas like student loan cancellation, Universal Child Care, free public college, and much, much more. And all of these plans can be made possible through her Ultra-Millionaire Tax.

Because it's time for billionaires to stop freeloading. It's time for them to pay their fair share and help level the playing field for working families.

**But if we want to make these plans a reality, we need to hit this critical November fundraising goal and continue building our movement.**

**[Please chip in right now to power this movement and help hit our goal before Saturday 's deadline, and keep an eye out for your free sticker in the mail.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b588/45c30650/11964b6be/66f6aedd/1206658338/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItYmlsLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDJDRl9FT01fU1RLX1RfMjAxOTExMjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-bil-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML2CF_EOM_STK_T_20191127_V1S3_P")**

We couldn't do this without you,

Team Warren

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: What we're thankful for...
body:
** This Thanksgiving, we're thankful for...
The chance to take part in and give back to our community.
------------------------------------------------------------
Over the last few months, we have been able to take advantage of several opportunities to engage with and help out members of our community.

Some of our efforts can be seen below:

Donating and Serving Thanksgiving Meals
We gave 20 pies, 100 rolls and bottles of waters, to the Thomas Street Health Center. Yesterday, I was able to volunteere there to help serve Thanksgiving meals.

Donating School Supplies

We were able to collect and give school supplies to Shadydale Elementary, & Wheatley, Worthing, and Kashmere High School.
Giving Candy to Kids in Pleasantville

We were fortunate to be able to give candy to the children of the Pleasantville community on Halloween.

Building the Settegast Community Garden

I was able to help build the Settegast Community Garden over the course of a month.
We were able to do all of this with the help of our supporters, who have graciously given their time and money to drive this campaign forward.

I have said since the start of my campaign that I am not running against anyone, nor am I running for myself. I am running to represent the people of District 18. Every day, I try to contribute to the community I hope to represent.

To do this, my focus is not on fundraising, but on community engagement. Please, donate $20 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=712717c258-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_27_04_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-712717c258-32267927) so that we can continue to dedicate time and energy to our neighbors.
Donate $20 today! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=712717c258-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_27_04_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-712717c258-32267927)
Thank you for your constant support, and Happy Thanksgiving!

Marc

============================================================
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=712717c258-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_27_04_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-712717c258-32267927)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=712717c258-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_27_04_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-712717c258-32267927)
** Website (http://mailchimp.com?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=712717c258-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_27_04_43&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-712717c258-32267927)

You are receiving this email because you are a supporter.

Our mailing address is:
Marc Flores for Congress
P.O. Box 924332
Houston, TX 77292
USA

You can ** update your preferences (https://marcfloresforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=27fa39eb8c212f355f01293ed&id=b08c1b6182&e=8f82f67314)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://marcfloresforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=27fa39eb8c212f355f01293ed&id=b08c1b6182&e=8f82f67314&c=712717c258)

Yang Gang --

We set a goal of raising $2 million by the end of the month. If we hit it, we’ll have the resources we need to keep our ads on the air and qualify for the December debate. Which is why we’re asking you to chip in today.

**You’re the plan. You’re Plan A, Plan B, Plan C, and Plan D. There is no backup plan.**

The Yang Gang is our entire strategy. Andrew doesn’t have a network of wealthy donors or a personal fortune to flood the airwaves. He has you.

[**That’s why we’re asking you to step up: Can you chip in now to help us get back on track to reach our $2 million goal? This is the time to go all in for Andrew.**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18038?t=11&akid=3790%2E377263%2EIulQFn)

We’ve asked you to step up before. And you’ve always delivered. The Yang Gang has never missed a goal -- and we’re not going to start now.

Thanks for being there for Andrew,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18038?t=5&akid=3790%2E377263%2EIulQFn)

Friend,
West Virginia’s gubernatorial race is heating up, and no one is feeling the heat more than Jim Justice. He knows that he can’t cover up the truth. Democrats, Republicans, and Independents across West Virginia are fed up with Justice.
Yesterday, Justice released his first television ad of the 2020 election because he wants to whitewash his record.
The Governor is betting that he can flood the state with television ads to distract voters from the mess he’s made. It’s up to us to prove him wrong.
Can you make a contribution right now to send a message to Jim Justice that West Virginia is not for sale? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/salango1127]
West Virginians know the truth about Jim Justice. They know he’s a deadbeat billionaire who only cares about one thing – himself. Together, we’re going to make him a one-term governor.
Thanks,
Ben Salango

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Great News!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Claudia was just endorsed by Winning For Women, one of the nation’s largest pro-woman groups. **BREAKING: Claudia Tenney Endorsed by Winning for Women.** [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ff393325001e4acab8012ca184cfb0d1&_e=RFexhcrukSvVPhtUtP6-nAwRACZkqnUrf9VOgPMOqHC-lq4w5KaJs6rsjh678PCtY3NYZvEw6jFOebGPeepfzVgQhUMlwIee8N7uVljCy9RrB4hs5nf4af49OFeSrmeOhEVk-h8ezKNrZOVoTmNCAPqxx0KYSKCzYK_2xFWJfm1tjNCI6ENxtr7fybZC4SS-BIgT0nySbMew1Iv9fsE9kEl_N6s6U2KpIfUY5l4x_6PhELZgNtYu8JXNHKnefgx5CY31iY5RDmuuy1nhARqWi7qqzuQo5r1GQ1GdXueo-qTgrEyHZ68AvFuqmIgS_Zz_IeoGJUMRB4HbwnVc-Gpu3SDeiFJ6OJ5VL1COOPSneGyhu28WKzBAKTnkVnFmVjdKfR_yW2zpGUMHgV0daw-zqD4DXKavF1xQd_SrI84VDN7o2zX1lEXn-38EWUTywFXvTkSn6kjJl679fap55slpqQ%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter,

I am very honored to announce that I have received the endorsement of one of the BIGGEST pro-women political groups in the country, Winning for Women. It is an honor to stand alongside strong, courageous women who are also looking to enact real change in their communities.

Winning For Women identifies and creates paths forward for female leaders who share the core values of economic freedom and strong national security. That’s why it is so HUGE to receive this endorsement.

Peter, Winning for Women know that we can win this race in 2020. That’s why they’ve given us their full support. We just need to keep fighting our hardest for Upstate New York and our values.
|
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=ff393325001e4acab8012ca184cfb0d1&_e=RFexhcrukSvVPhtUtP6-nAwRACZkqnUrf9VOgPMOqHC-lq4w5KaJs6rsjh678PCtY3NYZvEw6jFOebGPeepfzVgQhUMlwIee8N7uVljCy9RrB4hs5nf4af49OFeSrmeOhEVk-h8ezKNrZOVoTmNCAPqxx0KYSKCzYK_2xFWJfm1tjNCI6ENxtr7fybZC4SS-BIgT0nySbMew1Iv9fsE9kEl_N6s6U2KpIfUY5l4x_6P191XHdzwa48EpROq6DpmjXofX6AcIWo360UnpSshG_SZqjHCYxEEGNHEeIcw7E03orDIqoRAZL4RuUdxZ_y1iF0u_VgtDggLNozJo1V-V5pVK72FP6i6Hl1cr7VO6m313R8wrd-F5uKrTvVMDjZtLTgjGKx0CYEThe0Gs3xNnFYyFskdSRjxYibDjY9UTswIlr8auqshxm2LykLIxTJ6Um3j3lLqlB_ET-RFD6821QA%3D%3D)
|
---
It’s a shame that Democrats and even some women’s groups don’t want conservative women to succeed. But, with our latest endorsement, there’s no stopping us.

**Now that I have Winning For Women’s support, I want to make sure I have yours. Do I have your support in 2020? Tell me now:**

**Will you stand with Claudia in 2020?**

subject: "Control of the U.S. Senate is up for grabs" - Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight
body:
Democrats are up by three!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f6b/4bef7a87/6bbe2775/287ffd69/2060192671/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**" Control of the U.S. Senate is up for grabs"**
_**\- FiveThirtyEight**_
[**Chip in so we can take back the Senate for Democrats ->**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f6b/4bef7a87/6bbe2775/287ffd68/2060192671/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191127-1-full")
Friends,
Democrats' path to taking back the Senate cuts through Maine.
The good news is, we KNOW we can win. Susan Collins' net approval rating is down _47 points_ since 2017, AND a recent poll showed a **Democrat up by three points!**
The math works for us - but that doesn't mean Sara is going to walk into this Senate seat. Defeating Susan Collins and her special interest backers will be _incredibly_ difficult.
**That 's why we're starting the hard work now, and it's why we can't afford to fall short of our $150,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Can we count on your support?**
[**Make a $3 contribution before our November 30th deadline. We 're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so your donation will go a very long way towards helping us win. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f6b/4bef7a87/6bbe2775/287ffd68/2060192671/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjctMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191127-1-full")
Thanks for your support. When Sara wins this race, it will be because people like you believed in us from the very beginning.
All our best,
_Team Sara_

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Fwd: Kneeling for the anthem? It’s a DISGRACE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
This is quick note to make sure you saw my recent email. I wanted to reach you before the Thanksgiving holiday.
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

This is quick note to make sure you saw my recent email. I wanted to reach you before the Thanksgiving holiday.

I'm calling out Colin Kaepernick's disgraceful national anthem protests and the "politically correct" madness that has taken hold in our country... and I need YOUR help to help get my new ad in front of Alabama voters!

Check out my message below. And please, rush your support today, to help me defend our values and stand with President Trump to save America from the radical left.

**[**https://tommyforsenate.com/donate**](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=ae79294e8948789648a12ce7e70ba46d03c91a1c120732de61b83e553adc1f0831cbbce6315f91874ed57fc94207d5d9aea04afbf5fbfc1f)**

Tommy Tuberville
(sent from my iPhone)

___________________________________________________________

From: Coach Tuberville
To: Tommy Tuberville
Date: Thursday, November 22, 2019 12:02 PM
Subject: Kneeling for the anthem? It's a DISGRACE
---
| | | Tommy, We've all seen how the radical left has embraced Colin Kaepernick. They LOVE that he kneels for the national anthem... and he loves to play the victim.

Well, I'll tell you this. **I think it 's a DISGRACE.**

It's the people who've fought and died for our country that make it possible for him to play football. He should play, if he can... but he should stand for the national anthem.

_Believe me, kneeling for the anthem WOULD NOT happen on any team I coach!_

Today, we're launching a new ad. **[Watch it here, and chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help us get it in front of Alabama voters!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=ae79294e89487896dc8d1c5928dae192e792acaec57b4b582228a5fcd607f351def923cbce72a5fa65f7ecbe3abf33c857199250096bd1a0 "Watch it here, and chip in $5, $10, $25, or $50 today to help us get it in front of Alabama voters!")**
---
| [](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=ae79294e8948789648a12ce7e70ba46d03c91a1c120732de61b83e553adc1f0831cbbce6315f91874ed57fc94207d5d9aea04afbf5fbfc1f)
---
The way I was raised, before a football game you stood to honor America. And after the game, you knelt to honor God.

**Only in today 's world of "political correctness" gone mad is this considered controversial.**

Enough is enough. I'm fighting to defend our values, and to STOP the radical left's push for socialism, open borders, and abortion-on-demand. I'm running to help President Donald J. Trump SAVE our country.

**[Check out my new ad, and rush a special contribution to help share my message](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=ae79294e89487896b914214bfc59bf730077ac720db735d4f4d8d911023fd2d7bdb2d0e8a3483e85e34a6ee79fbc1e9c6da5281b05612b74 "Check out my new ad, and rush a special contribution to help share my message")**.

\- Coach Tuberville

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Lindsey Graham broke a huge promise, and it's costing him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter -- South Carolina Senator Lindsey Graham has spent the last weeks contorting his previous stances in every way possible to defend Trump against the impeachment proceedings. But this time, he's gone too far, even for him. Last week, Graham torched a longtime friendship along with what was left of his credibility when he announced he'd launch his own Senate investigation into Joe Biden's interactions with Ukraine \-- long debunked smears designed to muddy the waters of Trump's impeachment. Even as recently as September, Graham said he wouldn't attack Biden. This year, he's gone on television to call Biden "honorable" and "a good man." The facts of Biden's interactions with Ukraine in 2016 haven't changed \-- only Graham's fealty to Trump has. We need to work to get Lindsey and all of his fellow Trump-enabling senators out of office. Lindsey Graham's re-election campaign is flush with cash from large-money donors and corporate PACs, but Jaime Harrison, Graham's Democratic opponent, is making major headway with two back-to-back record-breaking fundraising quarters. We're asking voters what they think about Lindsey Graham and his re-election race, and we need 119 more responses by MIDNIGHT: **Do you support Lindsey Graham?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce5/6e9863e8/16ddc384/1db0a363/3106664510/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BgBHGJq1") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce5/6e9863e8/16ddc384/1db0a363/3106664510/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BgBHGJq1") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce5/6e9863e8/16ddc384/1db0a362/3106664510/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-jaime-nd?refcode=OUT20191127a.ND-b&refcode2=vlqZ9seA4tTCScxRdNeQ")
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Congress Isn’t Working this Week, but President Trump Is
body:
Congress broke for the Thanksgiving holiday late last week. Unfortunately, thanks to the far left’s recent impeachment stunt... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aa9ce2a8d7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Congress Isn’t Working this Week, but President Trump Is**

Congress broke for the Thanksgiving holiday late last week. Unfortunately, thanks to the far left’s recent impeachment stunt, Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s House has been effectively shut down for weeks.

That isn’t stopping President Donald J. Trump from working hard for the American people, though.

“Donald Trump signed the first animal cruelty bill of his presidency on Monday, outlawing narrow types of egregious violence usually committed for the purpose of videotaping them. The Senate unanimously passed the Preventing Animal Cruelty and Torture Act this month,” David Martosko reports for the _Daily Mail._

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d08103f80&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump signed an executive order establishing a task force to address the rash of violence against missing and murdered American Indians and Alaska natives, an issue the administration has been focusing on in recent months.” The President was joined by “a number of Native American tribal leaders,” Grace Segers reports for [CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b41b5a8a08&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| President Trump participated in the annual White House turkey pardoning ceremony yesterday in the Rose Garden. “Following the tradition of earlier presidents, Trump spared the lives of both of the turkeys presented to him, but he announced an official presidential pardon only for Butter, who was officially designated this year's National Thanksgiving Turkey,” David Jackson reports for _[USA Today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=132ae051ba&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|
---
| “Unfortunately for the American people, those looking to Congress for real solutions to real problems, the Democrat majority is continuing to waste time engaging in an any-means-necessary impeachment that seeks to pacify the Washington echo chamber. This partisan impeachment investigation is coming at a tremendous cost to Pennsylvanians and the American people at large,” Rep. Fred Keller (R-PA) writes in the [_Washington Examiner_.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=80d52b5d1d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2acd56ae9&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=09ba24650a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e810534a89)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

| | As we head into the holidays and the busiest shopping days of the season, let's take a moment to think about the workers. I've advocated that we not only raise the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour, but that we index it so that we don't have to keep having this fight, year after year. [Chip in $15 right now >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e2/3eb3e2fc/684553f6/744d5dbd/2087890037/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Chip+in+15+right+now+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all") We need to think about the farm workers who lack basic worker protections who grow the food we serve on our Thanksgiving tables. We should research which companies treat their workers well, buy local, and make sure our money isn't going to companies that reap major profits while their employees don't earn a living wage. **Wages shouldn 't be stagnant while profits soar. Let's build an economy where everyone prospers, not just the super wealthy. ** [If you believe workers deserve a livable wage and fair working conditions, contribute $15 now to help me grow this No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e2/3eb3e2fc/684553f6/744d5da3/2087890037/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e2/3eb3e2fc/684553f6/744d5da2/2087890037/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc8e2/3eb3e2fc/684553f6/744d5da1/2087890037/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191127_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Martin, Team Turner
subject: Before we gather
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyMDk3OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MjQ4NDc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Before we gather

Tomorrow is Thanksgiving holiday across our beautiful state and country.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEyMDk3OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjQ4NDc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0

In just a few short days... http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDEyMDk3OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjQ4NDc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Dear Peter,

Tomorrow is Thanksgiving holiday across our beautiful state and country. Before we gather with our friends and family to celebrate all the many things we are thankful for in this great country, let us be mindful that the freedoms and way of life we enjoy must be protected.

What we are seeing in Congress during this partisan impeachment process is shameful and is more of what we have grown accustomed to under the failed leadership of Nancy Pelosi and her lieutenant Adam Schiff. This is not how to run the House of Representatives.

On Saturday night, we will reach the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign to date. I am working for you each day to protect good paying jobs remaining here in the Miami Valley.

Mike needs your help. His opponent is a Washington lobbyist who would ally with Pelosi and Schiff if elected. To defeat her in 2020, Mike is going to need the help of patriots just like you to prevent the attacks of the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on her behalf.

Please consider donating before our deadline of Saturday at 11:59 PM. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEyMDk3OTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY0MjQ4NDc3OQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thanks for your continued support. We hope you have a lovely holiday with your friends and family.

Sincerely,

Martin, Team Turner

name: 2020 Alerts
subject: A deterioration of our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
While the Left is busy with their political theater, Marsha Blackburn and the conservative Senate Majority is conducting business, carrying out the people's work and doing the jobs they were sent to Washington to do.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDEyMTAzNzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjQ4ODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
OFFICIAL REPUBLICAN COMMUNICATION
---

Alert For: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEyMTAzNzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjQ4ODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Date: November 27, 2019

_It 's been 64 days since Nancy Pelosi announced that the House of Representatives was moving forward with official impeachment proceedings._

The hearings are nothing more than smoke and mirrors--a complete and total sham, and a disappointing deterioration of our democracy, all in the name of partisan games.

Still, while the Left is busy with their political theater, **Marsha Blackburn and the conservative Senate Majority are conducting business, carrying out the people's work and doing the jobs they were sent to Washington to do**.

Under Republican leadership, our great nation has seen record-low unemployment rates, historic job creation, one of the fastest economic recoveries in modern history, rebounding consumer confidence and the first major tax cuts and tax code revisions in over 30 years.

There is too much on the line, too many items on the agenda to allow the Left to gain momentum and continue governing through temper tantrums.

Every day that passes, we're approaching what will be one of the most consequential elections in recent history.

[**The time to act is now.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDEyMTAzNzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjQ4ODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Marsha is working with Republicans across the country to mobilize and engage patriots dedicated to building on our progress by protecting the White House and defending the Senate Majority, and she's hoping she can count on you to chip in to the effort.

[**_Join the movement, donate $20.20 to defend the Majority in 2020!_**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEyMTAzNzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjQ4ODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

******[DONATE $20.20 NOW](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDEyMTAzNzAS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MjQ4ODYxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)******

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: no where else to turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
I'm not sure where else to turn, everyone. We know losing in New Hampshire would mean handing the GOP Senate control for another two years -- and the GOP is all in to flip New Hampshire red.
Earlier this month, Corey Lewandowski met with Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump on Air Force One to plot their campaign to win in New Hampshire -- and then, Mike Pence came to New Hampshire to campaign for the GOP. We know they'll do everything they can to defeat me next year.
Maggie said that I should reach out because we really need to buckle down and raise $5,000 before Thanksgiving to help defend New Hampshire's other Senate seat and take back the Senate majority.
**Missing our $5,000 goal could mean losing in New Hampshire -- and with Senate control on the line, that's not a risk we can afford to take. So I'm counting on you to donate now, before tonight, to protect New Hampshire's Senate seat and give Democrats back the majority.**
[**Please click here to give $3 or more before tonight 's pre-Thanksgiving deadline.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30c/2a380d31/3d186224/f0e7fe/163513633/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTExMjdfQ0pTXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191127_CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Jeanne
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc30c/2a380d31/3d186224/f0e7fe/163513633/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTExMjdfQ0pTXzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191127_CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
