name: Jason Lewis
subject: Check out the Team Lewis RV!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
Did you see my earlier email on this? We’ve picked up a used Fleetwood Tioga RV... and we’ve been raising the money for a little detailing and the engine needs a tune-up so that it’s ready for the miles ahead!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/4017be9005f0c0f1c3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, Did you see my earlier email on this? We’ve picked up a used Fleetwood Tioga RV... and we’ve been raising the money for a little detailing and the engine needs a tune-up so that it’s ready for the miles ahead! [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/ccd68cce50d268b6c3d6b838967d376c/33183) The Team Lewis RV was a solid buy - I say that as a lifelong fiscal conservative. We just need to raise funds for a few small projects to get it repaired, reliable, and looking good, and we’re only $1,317 away from our goal. A number of folks have already responded. THANK YOU if you’ve already chipped in. **[If you haven’t yet, then chip in at least $25 dollars today and we'll save you a VIP spot at the ribbon cutting/unveiling, and you'll get to sign your name on the side!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/93c459be65297b1cc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** **[Chip in at least $50 dollars, and you'll have the opportunity for a photo with Jason too!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/d2e3a91b46491dbbc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** We’ve got a whole lot of ground to cover over the year ahead, to reach voters in every corner of Minnesota, share my message, and rally Republicans to TAKE BACK our great state from the socialist radicals. **[Thank you for any contribution you can help with](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/a31a03b3ab733875c3d6b838967d376c/33183)**... I hope you get a chance to check out the RV when we roll in for a stop near you! \- Jason id:2019-10-28-16:44:19:112t
**[Help Fix Up the Team Lewis RV!>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/01323a19d5cb840a/18ec72f6366933adc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** | |

name: Susan (Michael's wife)
subject: Will you help me surprise Michael for his birthday!? 🎂
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Good Morning Team Bennet!

I have a special request.

Michael's birthday falls on Thanksgiving this year (we're baking both pie AND cake!), which means he'll be off the campaign trail and home with the girls and me for a couple of days. I want to give him a card signed by at least 20,000 grateful supporters.

Among the many blessings in our life, I'm thankful every day that Michael is fighting to create opportunity for the next generation and to ensure America works better for all of us.

[I'm going to surprise him with the card tomorrow. Be sure to add your signature -- I know it will mean so much to him!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba987/134673f2/9c25e7e/6997a5d0/3229902750/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2019-birthday-card?source=EM_PET_B1_112719_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba987/134673f2/9c25e7e/6997a5d0/3229902750/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/2019-birthday-card?source=EM_PET_B1_112719_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
Michael's going to love this.

With gratitude,

Susan Daggett

Since Bill’s email, we’ve only raised a mere $3,456 dollar. **That is WELL short of our goal of raising $40,500 we need by Saturday at midnight.** [**Can you help us and chip in right now to ensure we have the money we need to access every ballot with deadlines in December?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rT_7uo-uPXH0ZTFj03pXoOA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191127fr_s&n=2) | | [CHIP IN:

Natalie

Team — here’s what’s going on.
Last week I asked you to help contribute to our Ballot Access Fund, a fund we’re using to make sure we’re on the ballot in every state. _Since then, you’ve helped us raise just over $6,780!_**Thank you!**
But here’s the bad news: there are a lot of states with ballot deadlines in December, and we need to spend**$40,500 to get on every ballot.**
[**We’re trying to raise these funds before the end of November to make sure we can reach our goal. So I am asking you again to please dig deep and help us — can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can today to help us raise the $40,500 we need to get on the ballot in every state with ballot deadlines in December?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rT_7uo-uPXH0ZTFj03pXoOA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191127fr_s&n=5)
| [CHIP IN:
BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21jleZuXV0z7FKJwfL63H0fAdWHzSGNE5yg9-Vg4qs9rT_7uo-uPXH0ZTFj03pXoOA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191127fr_s&n=6)

Thanks,
Bill

subject: Why we're asking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects

**
------------------------------------------------------------
We’ve sent several emails about our November fundraising deadline. We wanted to take a moment to explain why it’s so critical that we hit our goal.

Every month, we have online fundraising deadlines. Hitting our goals for these deadlines is the key to telling David’s story of being a political outsider focused on results, and to responding to false attacks from the Left.

If we miss our goals, then we lose the ability to tell our story. We lose the ability to respond to the attacks from Chuck Schumer and radical liberal donors. That’s why we’re asking you to chip in now to help us hit our goal. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects)
NOVEMBER DEADLINE: GIVE NOW (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects)
Democrats are determined to flip Georgia in 2020, and our opponents have already raised over $2 MILLION to spend attacking David. Falling short of our November goal now would simply be catastrophic.

If we let Democrats win in Georgia, then we hand Chuck Schumer the Senate majority. We can’t afford to let them close out 2019 with the momentum.

It doesn’t matter how large or small – any donation will help us get to where we need to be. Please, chip in now. (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects)

Team Perdue
DONATE NOW >>> (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects)

============================================================
PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE
** (https://secure.winred.com/david-perdue/2019-november-deadline?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2019nov27prospects)
We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
PO Box 12077, Atlanta, GA 30355
** Privacy Policy (https://perduesenate.com/privacy-policy)

Want to change how you receive these emails? We would hate to see you go - these emails are critical to our campaign - but you can ** update your preferences (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a4d292c925&e=02cd889ad3&c=64b998352c)

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: We can't slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2d/3579763434/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Last Tuesday marked 60 days since I announced my run for U.S. Senate. **Since then, I've visited over 55 cities and towns across the Commonwealth.** [****](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2e/3579763434/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") **And, I have no plans of slowing down.** From food pantries to community health centers, shelters to veterans homes, I am showing up for the people, places, and issues in Massachusetts that most need a champion. [**I'm excited to keep up the pace, and that's where you come in. Will you chip in $3 to gas up the car so I can continue meeting people where they are across the state?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2e/3579763434/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2e/3579763434/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") On the road, I hear the stories, heartache, frustration and challenges of those that are too often ignored and need a voice down in Washington. Housing, environmental justice, mental health care, worker protections, immigration--these are the issues that touch every corner of our Commonwealth, that are brought up time and time again. From Gloucester to Pittsfield to Worcester, Lawrence and New Bedford, our campaign is a movement to bring as many folks as we can into the process, continue these critical conversations, and amplify their voices. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2e/3579763434/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") [**We can't slow down now. Will you donate $3 to keep me and my team on the road and showing up for those that most need a champion?**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2e/3579763434/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-11-27-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") 55 cities and towns in 60 days was a lot of ground to cover, but there are too many voices still left unheard across Massachusetts. **Together, let's change that. Let's keep going. Let's show up. Let's keep hitting the road.** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2f/3579763434/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b28/3579763434/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b29/3579763434/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639097a/55b66746/2ca8e7f8/80f1b2a/3579763434/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-27-eom&refcode2=express-buttons")

clean_body: | "" | | Last Tuesday marked 60 days since I announced my run for U.S. Senate. Since then, I've visited over 55 cities and towns across the Commonwealth. "" And, I have no plans of slowing down. From food pantries to community health centers, shelters to veterans homes, I am showing up for the people, places, and issues in Massachusetts that most need a champion. "" "" On the road, I hear the stories, heartache, frustration and challenges of those that are too often ignored and need a voice down in Washington. Housing, environmental justice, mental health care, worker protections, immigration--these are the issues that touch every corner of our Commonwealth, that are brought up time and time again. From Gloucester to Pittsfield to Worcester, Lawrence and New Bedford, our campaign is a movement to bring as many folks as we can into the process, continue these critical conversations, and amplify their voices. "" "" 55 cities and towns in 60 days was a lot of ground to cover, but there are too many voices still left unheard across Massachusetts. Together, let's change that. Let's keep going. Let's show up. Let's keep hitting the road. Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We've never shied away from a challenge, you and I.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7684?first_name=Friend&donation_amount=%245&t=3&akid=7995%2E868730%2EoL_md-) Friend, Our midnight deadline is looming -- and we're falling short. But look: No matter what happens today, I want you to know I am so grateful to you. Tomorrow is Thanksgiving, and this year at our table we absolutely will be thanking grassroots supporters like you. The progress we've made this year, the work ahead -- we can't do any of it if we don't do it together. **So before the turkey and pumpkin pie, I wanted to say thank you. Truly.** And I hope you see a donation today as an investment in the work and progress here in Washington, because what we do here is influencing progress around the world. We have an aggressive goal -- $30,000 -- and an aggressive deadline -- midnight -- but we've never shied away from a challenge, you and I. Let's hit this hard, and let's do it together. | | **_Nashville Scene_ : "Republican Senate Candidates Set Out to Prove Loyalty to Trump"
[_Chip in before the end-of-month deadline ->_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1cf/18d6a294/4ceb8381/26d63e43/266359470/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTExMjciLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191127?refcode=jme191127_nd&recurring=true")** As I've traveled the state, Tennesseans have told me they're sick of politicians putting extreme partisanship ahead the needs of their constituents. My opponents have pledged their support to President Trump -- _not Tennesseans._ They promise more of the same, and that means more: \- Rural hospital closures;
\- Troubles for local businesses affected by the trade war;
\- Tragedy from the ongoing opioid epidemic. We can't afford more of the same. [_**I 'm running for the Senate to serve Tennesseans -- not one politician's political agenda. name: Shad Murib, Team Hick
subject: 4 seats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Next year, we can take the Senate majority back from Mitch McConnell and make sure that bold, progressive policy visions become reality. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377142a/691c9bd/6f90d0c3/11a7dde3/3487476715/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Hey team!

The 2020 news is already non-stop, but I want to make sure we don't lose sight of one thing: **Democrats are only four seats away from taking back the Senate majority next year.**

And it's clear the path to the Democratic majority runs right through Colorado. POLITICO just announced that Cory Gardner is the most vulnerable Republican Senator. [**_Can you chip in right now to make sure we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191127_SM_20191127-fr-SM-majority-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

No matter who we nominate as our candidate for president next year, they're sure to have a vision of bold, progressive policies that will lift up millions of Americans.

But the only way to make _sure_ those policies become reality is to take the majority away from Mitch McConnell in 2020. That's why we need this team to continue fighting alongside John every single day from now until November 3rd to make sure we win.

**Team, the Senate majority is within our grasp next year, but we need all hands on deck if we 're going to get there.** **Chip in whatever you can right now, and help us meet our end-of-month goal:** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191127_SM_20191127-fr-SM-majority-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

clean_body: Next year, we can take the Senate majority back from Mitch McConnell and make sure that bold, progressive policy visions become reality. | | | "" | Hey team! The 2020 news is already non-stop, but I want to make sure we don't lose sight of one thing: Democrats are only four seats away from taking back the Senate majority next year. And it's clear the path to the Democratic majority runs right through Colorado. POLITICO just announced that Cory Gardner is the most vulnerable Republican Senator. "=" No matter who we nominate as our candidate for president next year, they're sure to have a vision of bold, progressive policies that will lift up millions of Americans. But the only way to make sure those policies become reality is to take the majority away from Mitch McConnell in 2020. That's why we need this team to continue fighting alongside John every single day from now until November 3rd to make sure we win. name: MJ Hegar
subject: I don't do anything half-assed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're building a grassroots movement that's as big as Texas, which means we have to set ambitious goals.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099f/7f51f7bc/4b92ed7a/4ef088bc/3550149515/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **MJ for Texas

Amount needed to unlock match:
$8,026

Deadline:
Midnight** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099f/7f51f7bc/4b92ed7a/4ef088b3/3550149515/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.2nd__563__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

I'll be blunt with you, Peter:

**I didn 't get into this fight to do things half-assed.** I got into it to protect access to health care, defend our communities from climate change, and work to stop senseless gun violence. If we're going to succeed, we absolutely have to defeat Senator Cornyn on Election Day.

We're building a grassroots campaign as big as Texas, which means our fundraising goals have to be ambitious -- and yeah, it means I have to ask for your help to hit them -- but every time you pitch in to power this campaign, it's an investment in all that we're fighting for.

**We want to offer every member of Team MJ the opportunity to have their end-of-month donation MATCHED, but we have to raise $8,026 more TODAY -- and we 're not quite there yet. [Will you donate before midnight to unlock the match?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489099f/7f51f7bc/4b92ed7a/4ef088b3/3550149515/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.2nd__563__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn's nearly $11 million war chest is chock-full of corporate PAC money, which is no surprise since he's spent nearly 20 years selling Texans out to every special interest from Big Pharma to the gun lobby.

If we take this thing all the way and defeat him next November, it'll be because we came together and fought as hard as we could every single day of this campaign. We can't waste a single minute, Peter.

**We have just hours left before tonight 's deadline -- and I'm counting on you. Will you make a donation now to help us unlock matched donations for the rest of the month so we can raise the resources to defeat Senator Cornyn?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | | | | Friend, Before you sign off for the Thanksgiving holiday, Tom had a great debate last week — he made it clear to folks watching all around the country that we need serious structural reforms if we’re going to break the corporate stranglehold on our government. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Will you stand up to Trump for the DREAMers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment inquiry. The DACA program, which protects DREAMers from deportation, is before the Supreme Court, and Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. [**Congress has the ability to stop this by passing legislation guaranteeing the continuation of the program, but the GOP is so caught up in Trump 's racism, xenophobia, and political backstabbing that they can't see the bigger picture. Add your name to ours and call on Congress to protect DREAMers now!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce6/6e9863e8/16df1f1b/1db0a367/2384113483/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce6/6e9863e8/16df1f1b/1db0a367/2384113483/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Booker HQ
subject: We need leaders with empathy and humanity. Leaders like Cory Booker.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
This movement is a guiding light for those of us who are ready to turn the page on the hatred and bigotry of the Trump administration.
| | |
---
| Hey team, Christina here -- I'm Cory's Director of Millennial and Influencer Engagement! _What does that mean exactly?_ Well, my job is to engage millennials and make sure their perspectives are represented on our campaign. That's why I want to take a moment to share a few words with you about why I'm here trying to elect Cory Booker as the next president of the United States. This is the first campaign I've ever worked on -- I never thought of myself as someone who'd be working on a presidential campaign. By trade, I'm a journalist -- most recently, I spent time at publications like _Glamour_ and _Essence_ helping to build up their political news verticals. After the 2018 midterms, I started to think about other ways I could show up in 2020. At this particular moment, **I felt I had to do my part to help put people in power who lead with empathy and humanity.** Naturally, that's what led me to Cory Booker. **[We won't elect an empathetic leader like Cory without your help. As I write to you, we still need to hit a big $1.5 million end-of-month goal. Will you chip in whatever you can to get us there?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_BHQ_20191127-fr-BHQ-coleman-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** One of the things that drew me to Cory is he's just a genuinely good person. He's a champion for the causes that are so important to me and so many others -- like criminal justice reform, reproductive justice, affordable housing, and undoing historically harmful policies that have left so many Americans and so many communities behind. **He 's a leader who understands and speaks to the issues -- addressing Black maternal mortality, supporting HBCUs, increasing police accountability, combating white nationalism, providing economic empowerment -- that I face as a Black woman in America.** Cory approaches these fights from a different angle. He understands his place and platform, which allows him to learn how to be the best ally he can be. I trust that he has my best interests at heart. **[We need his voice in this race. I'm asking if you can step up today and donate $5 so we can reach our $1.5 million goal by 11:59 p.m. on Saturday.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_BHQ_20191127-fr-BHQ-coleman-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It may be my first campaign, but I'm especially in awe of how passionate every single one of my coworkers is about making this country a better place. My experience here has been equal parts exciting and inspiring -- folks have literally put their lives on hold to do this important work. I'm proud to have joined a campaign that is a guiding light for those of us who are ready to turn the page on the hatred and bigotry of the Trump administration. It's been inspiring to watch this movement grow. I have a feeling the best is still yet to come. Excited to be on this journey with you, friend,
Christina Christina Coleman
Director of Millennial & Influencer Engagement
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191127_BHQ_20191127-fr-BHQ-coleman-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _P.S. I actually first met Cory four years ago at the Congressional Black Caucus Conference. I was still a journalist at the time and had the honor of interviewing him. Never could 've imagined that a few short years later, I'd be working on his campaign to become president of the United States. _
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca947/1682229970/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca946/1682229970/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca945/1682229970/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca944/1682229970/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca943/1682229970/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0dd0/5fca0d19/796a3b72/291ca947/1682229970/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Senate Update (2)
subject: Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat for our right-wing, Trump-backed opponent.

---
| |
---
**IMPORTANT UPDATE, friend: Betsy DeVos' family is trying to buy Michigan's Senate seat for our right-wing Trump-backed opponent:**
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daabb/5721a3ed/71ce6f58/efaa7a8/3374396975/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMzgtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk138-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
And that's not all: Out-of-state, conservative billionaires have spent nearly $1 million, all to help buy Michigan's Senate seat for a candidate who supports Trump "2,000%."

**And guess what? It's _working_****. **A recent poll shows Gary **_TIED_** with his extremist opponent.
**With CBS reporting Senate control is riding on what happens here in Michigan, our fundraising is falling short. **We're only 89.8% of the way to our $36,400 goal - and we need to get there by midnight tonight.

name: David Hill
subject: What are you thankful for?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA | | [](http://links
body:
Thanksgiving is a time for food, quality time with family and friends, giving thanks and traditions. I just wanted to send a quick email to wish you all a Happy Thanksgiving! Thanksgiving is a time for food, quality time with family and friends, giving thanks and traditions.
Around my family’s Thanksgiving table, we have a tradition to share what we're thankful for. This Thanksgiving I am incredibly grateful for the unwavering support of my family. For my incredible wife, Shannon, and our three, strong, independent daughters and our three selfless sons who all serve in the Army. I am thankful for the way God has blessed our lives, for the opportunity to run for office to serve the people of Oklahoma, and for the tremendous support I have received for my campaign so far.
What are you thankful for this Thanksgiving? Respond to this email and let me know what you’re thankful for and if you have any traditions of your own.
I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving tomorrow. Thank you again for believing in my message and supporting this campaign.
David Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA | | name: Charles Booker
subject: My name is Charles Booker. I hope you'll join this movement.
body:
|
---
Folks, My name is Charles Booker. My story is Kentucky’s story. A story of perseverance, faith, and overcoming impossible obstacles. I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky. We sometimes went without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went without eating so that I could. But I still went to school hungry and tired. After I was diagnosed with diabetes, we were often forced to ration my insulin just to survive. _Growing up, my family did a lot with a little._ Today, my wife and I are raising two young girls. I’m still working to pay off my education before it’s time to pay for theirs. I’ve lived the struggles and trauma most career politicians have only talked about. **Here’s the truth: You know Mitch McConnell’s name. But he doesn’t know yours.** While he gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he personally gains power in Washington, our communities lose power in Kentucky. As a Kentucky State Representative, I’ve fought for our Commonwealth. I’ve championed gun reform, voting rights, labor laws, and criminal justice reform. I’ve passed bipartisan legislation to help people get insulin in emergency situations. I’ve done my best to lift up Kentuckians. There’s still much to be done. We need a Green New Deal to create thousands of good jobs here in Kentucky and end the exploitation of our land and our labor. We need Medicare for All so no one has to die because they don’t have money in their pocket. We need to break the cycle of generational poverty and give workers the dignity of a living wage, and the power to fight for more. We need to invest in ourselves, our children, and our communities. **So much more is possible in Kentucky and our country if we do.** I didn’t get these ideas from Washington insiders. I’ve been traveling the state having real conversations with **real people.** It’s from these discussions that I’ve come to a realization: This is the moment for someone to step up. That’s why I’m seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. Right now, it’s McConnell’s seat. But it belongs to the people of Kentucky. I want to do this right. As I continue to reach out to people about their concerns and priorities, I could use your help. I hope you’ll also connect with me on social media — I’m on [_**Twitter**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12297866/126322398/1694221378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY3NTk2My03OTExLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ECEJbjX5ovkGO7NFk1be4fpssjHlXNRHc61zaZPqAA=&emci=61bc2d7a-2f11-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=bdf75963-7911-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570), [_**Facebook**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12297867/126322399/1776681891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY3NTk2My03OTExLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ECEJbjX5ovkGO7NFk1be4fpssjHlXNRHc61zaZPqAA=&emci=61bc2d7a-2f11-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=bdf75963-7911-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570), and [_**Instagram.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12297868/126322400/1039233704?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGY3NTk2My03OTExLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ECEJbjX5ovkGO7NFk1be4fpssjHlXNRHc61zaZPqAA=&emci=61bc2d7a-2f11-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=bdf75963-7911-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2635570) That’s where we can talk more about this movement we’re building. I’ve been known to share some pretty cool family dance videos there, too!
There’s no denying that this is our defining moment. **This is our chance to take our future back.** We are not going to wait. We are not going to sit down.
Together, we can move mountains.
Thanks for listening,
Charles Booker

clean_body: | Folks, My name is Charles Booker. My story is Kentucky’s story. A story of perseverance, faith, and overcoming impossible obstacles. I grew up in one of the poorest zip codes in Kentucky. We sometimes went without heat in the winter or air conditioning in the summer. My mom often went without eating so that I could. But I still went to school hungry and tired. After I was diagnosed with diabetes, we were often forced to ration my insulin just to survive. Growing up, my family did a lot with a little. Today, my wife and I are raising two young girls. I’m still working to pay off my education before it’s time to pay for theirs. I’ve lived the struggles and trauma most career politicians have only talked about. Here’s the truth: You know Mitch McConnell’s name. But he doesn’t know yours. While he gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he personally gains power in Washington, our communities lose power in Kentucky. As a Kentucky State Representative, I’ve fought for our Commonwealth. I’ve championed gun reform, voting rights, labor laws, and criminal justice reform. I’ve passed bipartisan legislation to help people get insulin in emergency situations. I’ve done my best to lift up Kentuckians. There’s still much to be done. We need a Green New Deal to create thousands of good jobs here in Kentucky and end the exploitation of our land and our labor. We need Medicare for All so no one has to die because they don’t have money in their pocket. We need to break the cycle of generational poverty and give workers the dignity of a living wage, and the power to fight for more. We need to invest in ourselves, our children, and our communities. So much more is possible in Kentucky and our country if we do. I didn’t get these ideas from Washington insiders. I’ve been traveling the state having real conversations with real people. It’s from these discussions that I’ve come to a realization: This is the moment for someone to step up. That’s why I’m seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. Right now, it’s McConnell’s seat. But it belongs to the people of Kentucky. I want to do this right. As I continue to reach out to people about their concerns and priorities, I could use your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = I hope you’ll also connect with me on social media — I’m on , , and That’s where we can talk more about this movement we’re building. I’ve been known to share some pretty cool family dance videos there, too! There’s no denying that this is our defining moment. This is our chance to take our future back. We are not going to wait. We are not going to sit down. Together, we can move mountains. Thanks for listening, Charles Booker = = Contributions to CBEC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. While Mitch McConnell gets richer, our state gets poorer. As he gains power in Washington, our communities lose it in Kentucky. That’s why Charles Booker is seriously considering running for the U.S. Senate. But he wants to do this right. As he keeps traveling the state to have real conversations with real people, = Charles Booker Exploratory Committee PO BOX 11081 Louisville, KY 40251 United States

Against impossible odds, I went on to beat a Tea Party Republican in a terrible year for Democrats.

Six years later, I did it again.

The pundits considered us a long shot then -- and some are saying the same thing now.

[We proved them wrong before, and we'll do it again.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba98a/134673f2/9c49493/6997a5a3/2378713031/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_112719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: why I'm reaching out today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team -
I hope you're ready to make some change in this country, because together, we're in a position to write our nation's next chapter. **But we cannot do it without your help.**

A better future is not only possible - it's within reach. But Republicans are doing everything in their power to hold us back. They're obstructing the Democratic process so that they can keep pushing Trump's hateful, divisive agenda.

I should know - when I ran for governor of Georgia in 2018, I faced a nearly impossible task: overcoming systemic voter suppression by a Republican Party that silenced too many voices.
That's why I'm reaching out today: **Too much is at stake to sit on the sidelines.** In every election up and down the ballot, we can reject the Trump-GOP agenda and flip red states blue, but we cannot do that without the input of dedicated supporters like you. **[Will you take a moment to take our official Democratic Outreach Survey to ensure Democrats can create a winning strategy, flip red states blue and stop the Trump agenda?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY2NDM4NzcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTcyODcyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
**The next elections are about us. They 're our chance to fix what is broken - and to finally kick out those who broke it.**
But to claim victory on Election Day, we have a lot of work to do. We have to reach out to those who do not believe their voices matter and convince them otherwise. Because here's the thing: **Inaction can be contagious, but so can a passion for change. **

With your help, we will register every last voter, get them to the polls and prove to them that elections have the power to change their lives. **But, before we do that, we need your help setting our outreach strategy.**
**[Please Team, can I count on you to take a short survey to help Democrats win important elections across the country?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTY2NDM4NzcS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTcyODcyOAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
Team, we can't let this fight pass us by - not after we've seen what the GOP will do to win. Change starts small, but together, I know we can lead this country toward a brighter future for everyone.
Stacey Abrams

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16643877&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc2MTcyODcyOAS2&spReportId=MTc2MTcyODcyOAS2).

Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

name: Team Yang
subject: We wanted to make sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Carly knows the numbers -- and you know we’ve never missed a goal.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp) Yang Gang --

We wanted to make sure you saw Carly’s email yesterday.

We’re so thankful for all the support you’ve given us this far -- but as November comes to a close, we need you now more than ever.

We wouldn’t be reaching out to you if hitting $2 million by the end of November wasn’t important -- but it is.

We need this money to help with staffing up, ad buys, and so much more.

The Yang Gang has never missed a goal before, and time is running out. Carly knows numbers, so she knows that every single dollar you donate can make a difference.

[Can you rush $10 or more right now to make sure we meet our end-of-month goal? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=5&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp)

Thank you for never letting us down,

Team Yang

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Carly Reilly
Date: Tues, Nov 26, 2019 at 6:00 PM
Subject: Can't start now
[](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=13&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp) Yang Gang --

**I’ve got some troubling news to report:** Right now, we’re less than halfway to our goal, with only four days to go before we close our books on November.

**Here’s why we’re not panicking:** Fundraising tends to pick up in the final days of the month (I get it -- I’m a procrastinator, too).

**But we’re behind where we thought we’d be.**

[Can you chip in $10 to close the gap and put us in a good position to hit our November end-of-month deadline?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=12&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp)

---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp)
---

The Yang Gang hasn’t missed a goal yet, and we cannot start now. Let’s show ‘em what we’re made of.

Thank you,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18040?t=14&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3794%2E377263%2Eh9ftGp) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Doyle Canning for Congress
subject: What I will do in Congress to #stopJordanCove
body:
many have asked, "What can you do about Jordan Cove in the U.S. Congress?" So I penned a letter in the Coos Bay World to explain my plan. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2x2/QC0kv8U0QcugrnqUJhC0iA/h0/CA0gLXQEKb6jqGkD7RqZieSiR1xt6h2zAPrrZKB7vwlJFohMMbikevNUNlpcqi6-2F6vINA4Cc99YQwrIXxX9Wkzs8oZWbLVT2uQlh3oUd185BNATfIbbikPl6HQD5JiSxEfNxxLoDTaCwYMCaSImbdJ7DJPoXzq05roacfs40SdDe20FawlbkTpcWcfaVcrSoXh7eg-2BVzLnopM-2FPm0PU9XLhLQgLPe2K-2F7RNfOxhHivRGYCzRkItas6hH3tE-2BGsCUUo18HUkvN-2BHSpaDSwkELUFn4kpsdlbFM8t05-2F-2BDm4yde3cCqmr1DrOoonHmgEBt1uvNg7LoywCnjNc6KXpqLA90t6s6Iji3GVn5VYb9ZfDTpuKXRydEigpEaLO15Nmleo0iu9Buwx7KoUrSaNG-2F6-2F-2FhFI4G7-2BP5vjBCaVTp6pYJfxFP42pxLY6XXWoH-2FxCAFNee9w3D9MCrd9ajk-2FYjW7g-3D-3D/dRK7)

Dear Friends and Supporters, I was so proud to join 400 Oregonians at the capital in Salem last week to take a stand against the fracked gas pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG export terminal. As I have traveled throughout the district, talking with Oregonians about the threat of the Pacific Connector Pipeline and LNG, I have heard stories riddled with anxiety, anger, and an unwavering resolve to fight back. This fossil fuel project has been in the works for _15 years_ , and it is only because of the courageous organizing of neighbors and communities across Southern Oregon that the pipeline hasn't gone in the ground yet. This movement is thousands-strong, and has risen from the grassroots to confront Oregon's Democratic establishment, which has been actively or tacitly supporting Jordan Cove for over a decade. It is time to take a stand. The final Environmental Impact Statement has been submitted, and Trump's Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) is expected to approve the federal permit in early 2020. Various state and county permits are still pending and so Oregonians are pressuring those agencies to say no, setting up a clash of jurisdictions that Trump has made clear he will fight. We know what side Trump is on -- its time for Oregon's Democratic leaders to make it clear they're on our side. That's why we [released this video,](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2x2/QC0kv8U0QcugrnqUJhC0iA/h1/wplFAt0M3up5qBr4ZLpTD6deyZdwk-2BGqXYwSPmN-2Fd-2FbESd-2F4KMvbeOfFsgdwBnC-2BCZQwdQQWvpZfh9rpnFaGP3KSz-2FlTFK-2BWeKfWr9ES3gPMQT7aUCC9qNuhfoNrxmhvceMgxzkCdo7o-2BX7E4-2B-2BjwebJoSc5TyI1XdSFHqJix2ic9KhHtQoJQF9bYM5ce6-2BCyQ1ycqE8X7hD1H4ZIiEcHi4QSvYvHHnza7LVy0CcyQhCdvDdmKtvwbId2PW-2B6AWJunvb95465W0z-2F8faIB04OCJtGWrcC4OI0opOVWhyQ1DO67WOLTwILAGLPtbjdIdm/S4uh) calling on candidates and lawmakers at all levels to join us and oppose the project. (So far it has been seen by 10,000 people on [Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2x2/QC0kv8U0QcugrnqUJhC0iA/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8JRftxYcICZzCv675pJG8coguqLhL1gt95mWnTryUESZbief94R82QPQgPAyoyKF0GVp4vCSUbKvQ9lt1igjCMvYNstBMt-2BAAl6mEhVtE9gKL9QnxXnXuB7xPqko7ilxeMN-2BjZc6GupHQ8-2B259X-2B9kHNCbrfxv01iqOIvB9c5JvTqXC7VwYmF-2BpqUB33Ka94cBjUcOE8ZLsSTNMCrBQ48WiZS-2FJ4HvuloJWdxttrf7frH7qEh43U27T7gttdiSNp14bi-2BVxjekfBFUHlPjrpvv2DESWaypD5gh-2F4Sb6dxrZj4t6FlEjqoU7-2FYDWjUyMrTSH90FDMt-2BQ4Vq9ApbvXBqzNJBvz-2Bfbd7czTAa-2B-2BZs5eHOc-2Fv623MeGSOE-2Byzflju6m2AxFJDCO7Q-2FAO5vJqDPMT1Uew-2FvprDjmnVh46qIu0/iBZg)!) In my conversations, many have asked, "What can you do about Jordan Cove in the U.S. Congress?" So I penned [a letter in the Coos Bay World](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2x2/QC0kv8U0QcugrnqUJhC0iA/h3/mm2eSoK-2BXIHa7gkoSGo65ZXrIh-2F1imsRXsdMwhLCm750s3-2BFiV0-2BJbQ8qik9b2hmzwDC1Xs6RS1Q82HbkTghhh1EcSXNEEZi3BkNxgDjC2S1ybuxHPHoMdvN-2FUekKb-2FiC6Qve9X04-2BI-2F-2FhQlCfcW8-2ByOXHXxTZ8zV2Tq7lyNo-2Fv5BPO3HH6vDU0vNwrXM8sQ80JILoKMAR5R3JqA3-2B-2BINSfMv-2FKEBn-2BrlMKGjDSYtAwTJCvOuFGPZwMyW9sj4nRom2K-2B426wbz6-2FBVZVtAkJaOL7EhQlpbxe8iQNITT2O85iJ7hGSyrUGphzRad4CamB25SMOfxxQj5GUFLDNSVMKDBAQ3ddADrs38TmzMyrBYChfzuPewp5lefdmvxi7P6cIC-2BAJ35VHoV9zP8Y2OCZqInwA-2FVsLNko26gKGxvaEo5r0DFU-2BEJfCzefKcf-2FTRCuIY-2Fdi8E06dzw3bQO3rNV3w-3D-3D/KNVc) to explain my plan. I hope you will read, and share so that people in your community know where I stand on this critical issue for our district - and our planet. Onward, Doyle

[The Coos Bay World: Taking a Stand Against Jordan Cove LNG](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/HwE/ni0YAA/t.2x2/QC0kv8U0QcugrnqUJhC0iA/h5/mm2eSoK-2BXIHa7gkoSGo65ZXrIh-2F1imsRXsdMwhLCm750s3-2BFiV0-2BJbQ8qik9b2hmzwDC1Xs6RS1Q82HbkTghhh1EcSXNEEZi3BkNxgDjC2S1ybuxHPHoMdvN-2FUekKb-2FiC6Qve9X04-2BI-2F-2FhQlCfcW8-2ByOXHXxTZ8zV2Tq7lyNo-2Ftk-2BXeEzHJ1-2BQN4xdN64P8QrZRs6CRoqxpOk1M3hi50wwJG-2BL6PVULX2TfVa6oyOhaX-2Ftq1sRbFReuXxNoEUWAh1SzOzwDAVMaWw-2BbhuJw9LRtQ7AVDhHkKcyIj4Ufts-2BqbCsVTdDOoFggUxPmGBbSf6mKRiF4UUR9AOFyGIjep2dWefLW3nYUZ46vwU-2BhQ3kk5rWsu1p-2FQOruZ-2BmhbkVvd5teBwAf36g7rP7NX5ea8DNN-2FSpKCYA4KZNpnJdDXojIuIPSzLAr7anuEn5KdWfRWy4h-2FPAUWSPAAOEZ6SOBPcA-3D-3D/VxID) Guest View by Doyle Canning I've been listening to Oregonians directly impacted by the Jordan Cove LNG export terminal and fracked gas pipeline. A fisherman who fears LNG mega-tanker traffic could keep him from his livelihood at sea. A Tribal member worried for the future of salmon, steelhead, and sacred sites. Students on our campuses urging rapid transition off of fossil fuels because of dire climate impacts in their future. A resident of Coos County who would be burned alive by the LNG blast after the earthquake. Landowners showing me their beloved homes along the pipeline route, and the letters they've received from Pembina - the Canadian company behind Jordan Cove LNG - threatening eminent domain taking of their property. I've had south coast residents shed tears while telling me how tough this fight has been, and how grateful they are to be heard and supported by a candidate running for Congress. And that's why I'm running: because we deserve a champion. I am a Democratic candidate running to serve as your first Congresswoman in Washington. When elected, I will do everything in my power to fight Jordan Cove LNG and bring family wage jobs in renewable energy to our communities. I am a proud signer of the no fossil fuel money pledge and will accept no corporate PAC money for my campaign--not from Jordan Cove LNG PAC, or any other corporate sponsors. I am running to represent you, not them. When you send me to Congress, I will use my platform to bring national political attention to this fight, just as Jordan Cove LNG boosters in Congress have been doing for years. I will champion major renewable energy investments and job creation in Oregon, like offshore wind, tidal energy, solar power, and regenerative farming and forestry -- creating jobs that last for generations, while reducing climate pollution and building lasting prosperity for our communities. I will proudly champion bills that directly oppose the expansion of fossil fuel projects like Jordan Cove LNG. For example, I would co-sponsor a ban on fracking on public lands, supported by many Democratic candidates for president. I would co-sponsor or co-author bills such as H.R. 3671, and impose a moratorium on major new fossil fuel projects, end fossil subsidies, and reinstate the ban on crude oil and LNG exports, while investing in renewables and creating jobs. And I would vote against any bill that would help Jordan Cove LNG, and urge my colleagues to do the same. In contrast, my opponent has accepted contributions from Jordan Cove PAC, and from natural gas interests and fossil fuel corporations for decades. He has refused to use his platform to take a stand on Jordan Cove LNG, and has said if Pembina just pays landowners enough, "it looks like a great project." He is not a cosponsor of any of the bills mentioned above that would actually impact the viability of the project, and when the House lifted the LNG export ban and fast-tracked LNG permitting, our Congressman did not vote on those bills. Its time to take a stand. When I serve you in Congress, I will not have a magic wand that can stop this project overnight. But I will have 20 years of experience organizing communities, and fighting corporate power - and I will have a political bully pulpit that I will use to lead. I'll invite our Governor, and every political leader in Oregon, to support a transition to 100% renewable energy within the next decade. I'm running for Congress because decades of weak leadership and a failure to stand up to corporate money in politics has led to a crisis for our country and for our communities. Here in Oregon's fourth district, we are on the frontlines of a global fight to stop the expansion of fossil fuels, and we are also blessed with incredible opportunities to lead the transition to renewable energy with offshore wind. I will work tirelessly to build and expand the coalition pushing for major federal investments in a just transition to a renewable future as part of a Green New Deal that creates lasting jobs and safeguards our communities in southwest Oregon. After hearing directly from the people most affected by Jordan Cove LNG, how could anyone representing us, do anything less? _Doyle Canning is a Democratic candidate for Congress in 2020. She joined Oregonians from around the state for a rally to Stop Jordan Cove LNG on Nov. 21 in Salem. She lives in Eugene with her family._

clean_body: many have asked, "What can you do about Jordan Cove in the U.S. Congress?" So I penned a letter in the Coos Bay World to explain my plan. | | | | Dear Friends and Supporters, I was so proud to join 400 Oregonians at the capital in Salem last week to take a stand against the fracked gas pipeline and Jordan Cove LNG export terminal. As I have traveled throughout the district, talking with Oregonians about the threat of the Pacific Connector Pipeline and LNG, I have heard stories riddled with anxiety, anger, and an unwavering resolve to fight back. This fossil fuel project has been in the works for 15 years , and it is only because of the courageous organizing of neighbors and communities across Southern Oregon that the pipeline hasn't gone in the ground yet. This movement is thousands-strong, and has risen from the grassroots to confront Oregon's Democratic establishment, which has been actively or tacitly supporting Jordan Cove for over a decade. It is time to take a stand. The final Environmental Impact Statement has been submitted, and Trump's Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC) is expected to approve the federal permit in early 2020. Various state and county permits are still pending and so Oregonians are pressuring those agencies to say no, setting up a clash of jurisdictions that Trump has made clear he will fight. We know what side Trump is on -- its time for Oregon's Democratic leaders to make it clear they're on our side. That's why we calling on candidates and lawmakers at all levels to join us and oppose the project. (So far it has been seen by 10,000 people on !) In my conversations, many have asked, "What can you do about Jordan Cove in the U.S. Congress?" So I penned to explain my plan. I hope you will read, and share so that people in your community know where I stand on this critical issue for our district - and our planet. Onward, Doyle | Guest View by Doyle Canning I've been listening to Oregonians directly impacted by the Jordan Cove LNG export terminal and fracked gas pipeline. A fisherman who fears LNG mega-tanker traffic could keep him from his livelihood at sea. A Tribal member worried for the future of salmon, steelhead, and sacred sites. Students on our campuses urging rapid transition off of fossil fuels because of dire climate impacts in their future. A resident of Coos County who would be burned alive by the LNG blast after the earthquake. Landowners showing me their beloved homes along the pipeline route, and the letters they've received from Pembina - the Canadian company behind Jordan Cove LNG - threatening eminent domain taking of their property. I've had south coast residents shed tears while telling me how tough this fight has been, and how grateful they are to be heard and supported by a candidate running for Congress. And that's why I'm running: because we deserve a champion. I am a Democratic candidate running to serve as your first Congresswoman in Washington. When elected, I will do everything in my power to fight Jordan Cove LNG and bring family wage jobs in renewable energy to our communities. I am a proud signer of the no fossil fuel money pledge and will accept no corporate PAC money for my campaign--not from Jordan Cove LNG PAC, or any other corporate sponsors. I am running to represent you, not them. When you send me to Congress, I will use my platform to bring national political attention to this fight, just as Jordan Cove LNG boosters in Congress have been doing for years. I will champion major renewable energy investments and job creation in Oregon, like offshore wind, tidal energy, solar power, and regenerative farming and forestry -- creating jobs that last for generations, while reducing climate pollution and building lasting prosperity for our communities. I will proudly champion bills that directly oppose the expansion of fossil fuel projects like Jordan Cove LNG. For example, I would co-sponsor a ban on fracking on public lands, supported by many Democratic candidates for president. I would co-sponsor or co-author bills such as H.R. 3671, and impose a moratorium on major new fossil fuel projects, end fossil subsidies, and reinstate the ban on crude oil and LNG exports, while investing in renewables and creating jobs. And I would vote against any bill that would help Jordan Cove LNG, and urge my colleagues to do the same. In contrast, my opponent has accepted contributions from Jordan Cove PAC, and from natural gas interests and fossil fuel corporations for decades. He has refused to use his platform to take a stand on Jordan Cove LNG, and has said if Pembina just pays landowners enough, "it looks like a great project." He is not a cosponsor of any of the bills mentioned above that would actually impact the viability of the project, and when the House lifted the LNG export ban and fast-tracked LNG permitting, our Congressman did not vote on those bills. Its time to take a stand. When I serve you in Congress, I will not have a magic wand that can stop this project overnight. But I will have 20 years of experience organizing communities, and fighting corporate power - and I will have a political bully pulpit that I will use to lead. I'll invite our Governor, and every political leader in Oregon, to support a transition to 100% renewable energy within the next decade. I'm running for Congress because decades of weak leadership and a failure to stand up to corporate money in politics has led to a crisis for our country and for our communities. Here in Oregon's fourth district, we are on the frontlines of a global fight to stop the expansion of fossil fuels, and we are also blessed with incredible opportunities to lead the transition to renewable energy with offshore wind. I will work tirelessly to build and expand the coalition pushing for major federal investments in a just transition to a renewable future as part of a Green New Deal that creates lasting jobs and safeguards our communities in southwest Oregon. After hearing directly from the people most affected by Jordan Cove LNG, how could anyone representing us, do anything less? Doyle Canning is a Democratic candidate for Congress in 2020. She joined Oregonians from around the state for a rally to Stop Jordan Cove LNG on Nov. 21 in Salem. She lives in Eugene with her family. | Join Us on Wednesday Evenings to Reach Out to Democrats in District 4! name: Team Tina
subject: Playing the long game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Our team is working around the clock to make sure Tina is re-elected, Democrats flip the Senate, and Donald Trump is sent packing. But we're asking for one thing in return.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191127-return?refcode=em191127-return&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

In one year, we'll already know the results of the 2020 election. We'll know whether or not Tina stays in the Senate. We'll know if Democrats take back the majority. And we'll know if Donald Trump will have another four years in the Oval Office.

The stakes could not be higher in this election -- which is why whenever we ask for you to chip in some of your hard-earned dollars, we're not just focused on gathering the resources we need now. We're playing the long game and looking to November 3, 2020.

Our team is working around the clock to make sure Tina is re-elected, Democrats flip the Senate, and Donald Trump is sent packing. But we're asking for one thing in return.

**Will you help us build a winning campaign to keep Minnesota blue and re-elect Tina by chipping in $10 (or more!) before our end-of-month deadline? name: Laura Loomer
subject: President Trump’s Homecoming!
body:
Last night was amazing! I attended President Trump's "Homecoming" rally in Sunrise, Florida and I have to be honest, I couldn't be any more excited to represent President and Mrs. Trump and the other amazing voters in Florida!
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732384-8bed512a6b-ef5d742268)
Patriot,

Last night was amazing!

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732383-6ff7dd31df-ef5d742268) I attended President Trump's "Homecoming" rally in Sunrise, Florida and I have to be honest, I couldn't be any more excited to unseat Socialist-Democrat incumbent, Lois Frankel, and represent President and Mrs. Trump and all my fellow Americans in CD-21!

The district where I’m running, Florida 21, is clearly THE battleground race of 2020.

Before you start the holiday, [**please help me meet our November fundraising goals**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732383-6ff7dd31df-ef5d742268). It’s me against a radical Democrat incumbent who is spending her time in Congress, obsessing over the removal of our president.

It’s disgusting!

**Out first family deserves a new member of Congress representing them,[and you can help make that happen by donating to support my race](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732383-6ff7dd31df-ef5d742268).**
At the rally last night, I had a chance to chat with President Trump’s campaign manager Brad Parscale after he released a statement regarding Big Tech’s election manipulation.

If anyone knows about that, it’s me! So I thanked Mr. Parscale for bringing attention to the issue.

But let me explain what happened as plainly as possible.

Google made a recent change to its advertising policies so that you can no longer directly target voters with ads.

Before the change, a campaign could upload a list of voters, for instance, who have voted in a Republican primary, and serve ads to them. It was a cost-effective means of advertising and was a way to communicate with hard to reach voters to get-out-the-vote.

The change by Google suppresses voter turnout—a move that will benefit Democrats in 2020!

I stand with Mr. Parscale and the Trump campaign in condemning Google’s policy change.

It comes on the back of Twitter changing their rules (the day after I announced my run) and their more recent decision to ban political ads.

And then Facebook jumped on board by tightening restrictions on political ads and just announced their new policy of providing illegal, in-kind contributions to the political opponents of "banned" candidates like me.

So if Google, Facebook, and Twitter ALL want to make it more difficult to reach voters, what does that say?

**THEY DON’T WANT YOU TO VOTE! THEY DON’T WANT YOU TO DONATE TO, VOLUNTEER FOR OR CHEER ON CONSERVATIVE CANDIDATES!**
My campaign has prepared for this, and we're providing our winning formula to other candidates who need to fight past the tech censorship.

And it starts with you . . .

[**For every $25 you can donate, I can reach 1,000 like-minded Americans to recruit them and keep them engaged through 2020.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732383-6ff7dd31df-ef5d742268)
So before you start your holiday weekend, [**please chip in $25**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-4732383-6ff7dd31df-ef5d742268) to help us keep the momentum going and beat back the attempts by Big Tech to keep voters and supporters in the dark.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-354892-827252-84585d41bbe610b-ef5d742268)

---

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: We're emailing to ask you to make your first online contribution before our November 30th deadline. We need your help in order to hit our $150,000 end-of-month goal!
body:
We can do it!
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f6c/4bef7a87/6bb152ac/287ffd10/1767799077/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

We KNOW we can defeat Susan Collins. Here's why:
* **We 're gaining ground fast:** After just a few months in this race, _Cook Political Report_ ranked us a "toss-up." Now, a recent poll shows a Democrat up by three points!
* **Maine is poised to flip:** Collins' approval ratings are at an all-time low. Mainers are clearly ready for a Senator who puts their needs first in Washington.
* **We have you:** Our campaign has received over 100,000 grassroots online contributions. That's important because Sara can't win this race alone.

Momentum is clearly on our side, but we have to keep pushing every single day if we want to win. So what do you say?
[**Make your first online contribution before our November 30th deadline. We need your help in order to hit our $150,000 end-of-month goal!**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f6c/4bef7a87/6bb152ac/287ffd17/1767799077/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMjctMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november-eom?refcode=em191127-2-full")
Together, we are proving that we have what it takes to defeat Susan Collins and flip the U.S. Senate for Democrats. Thank you for being a part of that.
All our best,
\- Team Sara

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Poll numbers spell trouble for Trump with key demographic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, _Reuters_ recently released a poll that highlights a growing problem for Trump's re-election campaign: he is very unpopular with independents. 62% of independents surveyed disapproved of him, higher than the national opinion average, and 64% of independents also believe the country is currently on the wrong track. Independent voters may be the key to unseating Donald Trump and retaking the White House, but with the news cycle and public opinion changing so quickly, we need to keep our data from all engaged voters as up-to-date as possible. Can you update your response now? **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce8/6e9863e8/16d94bef/1db0a364/2323005770/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/m-7F-mJo") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce8/6e9863e8/16d94bef/1db0a364/2323005770/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/m-7F-mJo") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdce8/6e9863e8/16d94bef/1db0a36a/2323005770/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191127c.ND&refcode2=G8OfF2YYDVMhuYk68SeX")

name: deadline-alert@nikkifosteroh.com
subject: We're taking a stand against blind partisan loyalty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf22/30a4f917/50902de6/28ced3c0/2690536622/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1")

| | Since the impeachment hearings began, Democrats across the country are rejecting Donald Trump's clear abuse of power -- and the blind partisan loyalty extreme Republicans are showing to him -- by stepping up and committing to making a change in 2020. Our Republican opponent, Steve Chabot, has called impeachment a "partisan witch hunt," and "fundamentally unfair" \-- and our November fundraising numbers will help us send a strong message that America is done with spineless representatives. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Since the impeachment hearings began, Democrats across the country are rejecting Donald Trump's clear abuse of power -- **and the blind partisan loyalty extreme Republicans are showing to him** \-- by stepping up and committing to making a change in 2020. Our Republican opponent, Steve Chabot, has called impeachment a "partisan witch hunt," and "fundamentally unfair" \-- **and our November fundraising numbers will help us send a strong message that America is done with spineless representatives.** That's why we're reaching out -- we need to raise $8,792 more before the end of the month so we can prove it doesn't pay to roll over for the president. [**Will you chip in to help us hit our end of month goal?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+us+hit+our+end+&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1")

Extreme Republicans in the House are making a mockery and a spectacle of these serious hearings -- using them as a venue for political stunts rather than a serious investigation.
The American people are sick of it -- and we're standing up in a unified voice to say that we won't stand for this cowardly behavior.
But to bring consequences to their door, we have to run hard-fought and well-funded campaigns. Nikki is ready to be an honest, courageous, and compassionate representative for OH-01 -- but she can't win without our help.
[**Will you chip in before Saturday so we can hit our end of month goal and win this race?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_noveom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+chip+in+before+Saturday+so+we+c&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191127_EOM2_U1_X1")

[**We need to pick up the pace if we're going to hit our November fundraising goal -- so we're thanking every supporter who chips in with a free sticker. Chip in now to help reach our goal and get a free sticker >>**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b5b0/45c30650/11930dd35/66f94225/1475341898/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItYmlsLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDJERl9FT01fU1RLX1dfMjAxOTExMjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-bil-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML2DF_EOM_STK_W_20191127_V1S3_P")
Elizabeth has proposed an Ultra-Millionaire Tax for the top tenth of one percent in this country, where for every dollar of net worth over $50 million, the ultra-wealthy have to pitch in at least two cents.

That's how we'll get Universal Child Care for every baby in this country ages 0-5. We'll provide universal Pre-K, invest in our K-12 public schools, and provide universal free college. We'll invest a minimum $50 billion into our Historically Black Colleges and Universities, raise the wages of every child care worker and pre-school teacher, and cancel student debt. And more.

But, to no one's surprise, some billionaires have no interest in paying their fair share. So they're pulling out all the stops to try and slow our momentum -- including pouring tens of millions of dollars in this primary to buy this election and stop our movement in its tracks.

**Well we're not slowing down -- we're doubling down. And fighting harder than ever before.**

We're expanding our organizing efforts and ground game _every single day_ all across the country -- because that's how we're going to win in 2020. But if we want to continue, it's going to take nothing less than a grassroots movement. And we need your help in this fight.

**It's absolutely crucial that we reach our fundraising goals to continue growing our movement across the country, and your impact would be crucial as we close out 2019.**

[**So if you're tired of freeloading billionaires trying to influence the election, can you chip in for the first time today to help reach our November goal? We'll send you a free sticker as a thank you!**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b5b0/45c30650/11930dd35/66f94225/1475341898/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnItYmlsLXN0aWNrZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDJERl9FT01fU1RLX1dfMjAxOTExMjdfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr-bil-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML2DF_EOM_STK_W_20191127_V1S3_P")
