body:
Did you see this message from MJ? We need your help to unlock this match.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08886/1821092918/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **MJ for Texas**

Amount still needed to unlock match: **$2,856**

Deadline: **Midnight**

Donation Received From dpwillis67@gmail.com:
**NOT YET!***

**[DONATE NOW >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
In case you missed the news today, Peter:

We're so close to being able to unlock the match! If we can raise another $2,856 by MIDNIGHT, all donations made before the end of November will be DOUBLED.

**[Will you read MJ's email below and then pitch in to help us unlock the match?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks!
\-- Taylor, MJ for Texas
_*If you've already contributed to the campaign or donated through a different source, thank you so much! Our records are based on our online database which may take some time to update._

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar**
Subject: I don't do anything half-assed
>
>
> **MJ for Texas
>
> Amount needed to unlock match:
> $8,026
>
> Deadline:
> Midnight** **[**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
> ---
>
>
> I'll be blunt with you, team:
>
> **I didn 't get into this fight to do things half-assed.** I got into it to protect access to health care, defend our communities from climate change, and work to stop senseless gun violence. If we're going to succeed, we absolutely have to defeat Senator Cornyn on Election Day.
>
> We're building a grassroots campaign as big as Texas, which means our fundraising goals have to be ambitious -- and yeah, it means I have to ask for your help to hit them -- but every time you pitch in to power this campaign, it's an investment in all that we're fighting for.
>
> **We want to offer every member of Team MJ the opportunity to have their end-of-month donation MATCHED, but we have to raise $8,026 more TODAY -- and we 're not quite there yet. [Will you donate before midnight to unlock the match?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
> Senator Cornyn's nearly $11 million war chest is chock-full of corporate PAC money, which is no surprise since he's spent nearly 20 years selling Texans out to every special interest from Big Pharma to the gun lobby.
>
> If we take this thing all the way and defeat him next November, it'll be because we came together and fought as hard as we could every single day of this campaign. We can't waste a single minute, Peter.
>
> **We have just hours left before tonight 's deadline -- and I'm counting on you. Will you make a donation now to help us unlock matched donations for the rest of the month so we can raise the resources to defeat Senator Cornyn?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5> > ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef088fa/1821092918/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10> > ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef088f8/1821092918/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25> > ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef088fe/1821092918/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50> > ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef088fc/1821092918/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount> > ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef088f3/1821092918/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__")**
> Thanks,
> MJ Hegar
>
>
>
> **[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890999/7f51f7bc/4b977ece/4ef08884/1821092918/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-unlockmatch?refcode=email_20191127.3nd__565__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
>

Will you make a donation now to help us unlock matched donations for the rest of the month so we can raise the resources to defeat Senator Cornyn? subject: Watch: Vice President Pence delivers a Thanksgiving message to our troops
body:
Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence made a surprise trip overseas this past weekend, visiting brave American soldiers... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a08ab6e16b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 27, 2019
---
| | |
# **Watch: Vice President Pence delivers a Thanksgiving message to our troops**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=431276fcc5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Vice President Mike Pence** and Second Lady Karen Pence made a surprise trip overseas this past weekend, visiting brave American soldiers who are stationed in Iraq over this Thanksgiving holiday.

**“The President wanted us** to be here at the start of this holiday week to make sure you all know how thankful we are and every American is for your courageous service here in Iraq,” the Vice President told service members at Al Asad Air Base.

**During the holiday season,** we are reminded again of the sacrifice our military men and women make—especially those who serve far away from their families back home. As the Vice President and Second Lady visited two air bases over the weekend, they offered appreciation on behalf of a grateful nation and handed out Thanksgiving meals.

**“In gatherings large and small** all across the country, I know there’ll be a place saved at Thanksgiving tables for each and every one of you,” the Vice President said.

**“But I also know** that millions of Americans—when they pause to reflect on what they’re thankful for—they’re going to breathe a prayer of thanksgiving for each and every one of you and all of the men and women of the Armed Forces of the United States deployed around the world. I promise you that.”

**🎬****Watch:** [Vice President and Second Lady serve a Thanksgiving meal to our troops](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0474bd364b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
| **President Donald J. Trump, joined by First Lady Melania Trump, delivers remarks during the National Thanksgiving Turkey Pardoning Ceremony in the Rose Garden. “On behalf of the entire Trump family, I wish each and every one of you a very happy Thanksgiving.”** | November 26, 2019
